inputs.businessContext: Actual time equipment is running (planned production time minus downtime). ISO 22400.

inputs.label: Ideal Cycle Time (minutes per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Theoretical minimum time to produce one unit under optimal conditions. ISO 22400.

inputs.label: Total Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced during operating time.

inputs.label: Good Parts Produced
inputs.businessContext: Number of units meeting quality standards (first pass yield).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Used for adjusted OEE. Common in lean manufacturing assessments.

suggestedActions: availability < 0.9 ? 'Implement TPM and reduce unplanned downtime' : ''
performance < 0.95 ? 'Analyze cycle time variances and reduce minor stops' : ''
quality < 0.99 ? 'Apply root cause analysis for defects and improve process control' : ''

inputs.label: Total Square Feet
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be cleaned. Standard industry metric for cleaning bids (ISSA, BSCAI).

inputs.label: Cleaning Frequency per Week
inputs.businessContext: Number of cleaning visits per week. Common range 1-7 (daily).

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Based on local minimum wage and market rates (BLS).

inputs.label: Productivity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average area cleaned per person per hour. Industry benchmark 1500-2500 sq ft/hr (ISSA).

inputs.label: Supplies Cost per Sq Ft
inputs.businessContext: Cost of cleaning supplies per square foot. Includes chemicals, paper, etc. (ISCA).

inputs.label: Equipment Cost per Sq Ft
inputs.businessContext: Amortized equipment cost per square foot (vacuum, mops, etc.).

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs (management, insurance, etc.). Typical 15-30%.

inputs.label: Profit Margin Target
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on total cost. Industry standard 10-20%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

inputs.label: Service Level
inputs.businessContext: Quality tier: basic (light cleaning), standard (full cleaning), premium (deep cleaning).

thresholds.laborRatePerHour: if laborRatePerHour < 10 then 'Low wage alert: may affect quality'
thresholds.productivityFactor: if productivityFactor > 3000 then 'High productivity may indicate insufficient cleaning'
thresholds.profitMarginTarget: if profitMarginTarget > 30 then 'High margin may reduce competitiveness'

hiddenLossDrivers: if laborRatePerHour < 10 then 'Low labor rate may lead to high turnover'
if productivityFactor > 3000 then 'Overestimated productivity may cause understaffing'
if profitMarginTarget > 30 then 'High margin may lose bid'
suggestedActions: Consider adjusting labor rate to attract quality staff
Verify productivity factor with time studies
Review overhead allocation for accuracy
Benchmark profit margin against competitors

inputs.label: Çalışan Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Ofis çalışanı sayısı, kırtasiye tüketimini doğrudan etkiler. ISO 9001:2015 ofis süreçleri standardı referans alınmıştır.

inputs.label: Kırtasiye Türü
inputs.businessContext: Farklı kırtasiye türlerinin birim maliyet ve tüketim oranları farklıdır. Lean ofis yönetimi prensiplerine dayanır.

inputs.label: Birim Maliyet
inputs.businessContext: Seçilen kırtasiye türünün birim satın alma maliyeti. Piyasa araştırması veya tedarikçi fiyatları baz alınır.

inputs.label: Aylık Tüketim Oranı (kişi başı)
inputs.businessContext: Kişi başı aylık ortalama tüketim miktarı. Sektörel benchmarklar (APICS ofis malzemeleri raporu) referans alınır.

inputs.label: Mevcut Stok Miktarı
inputs.businessContext: Eldeki mevcut stok adedi. Stok yönetimi ve yeniden sipariş noktası hesaplamaları için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Sipariş Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Her sipariş için sabit maliyet (kargo, işlem ücreti vb.). EOQ modeli için gereklidir.

inputs.label: Elde Bulundurma Maliyeti (birim başına yıllık)
inputs.businessContext: Stokta tutma maliyeti (depolama, sigorta, fire). Genellikle birim maliyetin %10-20'si olarak alınır.

inputs.label: Teslim Süresi (gün)
inputs.businessContext: Sipariş verildikten sonra malzemenin gelme süresi. Yeniden sipariş noktası hesaplamasında kullanılır.

inputs.label: Güvenlik Stoku Günü
inputs.businessContext: Talep belirsizliğine karşı tutulan ek stok gün sayısı. Lean Six Sigma prensiplerine dayanır.

inputs.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük ise sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

thresholds.stokMiktari: stokMiktari < (aylikTuketimOrani * calisanSayisi * (teslimSuresi + guvenlikStokuGunu) / 30) ? 'Stok seviyesi kritik, yeniden sipariş verilmeli' : null
thresholds.birimMaliyet: birimMaliyet > 100 ? 'Birim maliyet yüksek, alternatif tedarikçi araştırılmalı' : null

hiddenLossDrivers: stokMiktari < yenidenSiparisNoktasi ? 'Stok seviyesi kritik, yeniden sipariş verilmeli' : null
birimMaliyet > 100 ? 'Birim maliyet yüksek, alternatif tedarikçi araştırılmalı' : null
suggestedActions: Ekonomik sipariş miktarını kullanarak siparişleri optimize edin.
Yeniden sipariş noktasını izleyerek stok tükenmesini önleyin.
Birim maliyetleri düşürmek için toplu alım veya alternatif tedarikçi değerlendirin.
Güvenlik stoku seviyesini talep değişkenliğine göre ayarlayın.

inputs.label: İlk Parça Üretim Süresi (dakika)
inputs.businessContext: İlk parçanın üretilmesi için gereken süre. Öğrenme eğrisi teorisine göre (Wright 1936) ilk parça süresi temel alınır.

inputs.label: Öğrenme Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: Her üretim miktarı iki katına çıktığında birim süredeki azalma yüzdesi. Tipik değerler: %70-90 arası. Kaynak: Wright öğrenme eğrisi modeli.

inputs.label: Parti Büyüklüğü (adet)
inputs.businessContext: Üretilecek toplam parti miktarı. Parti süresi tahmini için temel girdi.

inputs.label: Hazırlık Süresi (dakika)
inputs.businessContext: Parti başına makine/hat hazırlık süresi. SMED prensipleri ile ilişkilidir.

inputs.label: Operatör Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Aynı anda çalışan operatör sayısı. İş gücü planlaması için önemli.

inputs.label: Saatlik İşçilik Maliyeti (TL/saat)
inputs.businessContext: Operatör başına saatlik maliyet. Maliyet analizi için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Genel Gider Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: Direkt işçilik maliyetine eklenen genel gider yüzdesi. Endüstri mühendisliği maliyet muhasebesi standardı.

suggestedActions: learningRate < 70 ? 'Öğrenme oranını artırmak için eğitim ve standardizasyon uygulayın.' : ''
setupTime > 60 ? 'SMED teknikleri ile hazırlık süresini azaltın.' : ''
batchSize < 10 ? 'Parti büyüklüğünü artırmak için talep birleştirme veya ekonomik parti büyüklüğü hesaplaması yapın.' : ''

inputs.label: İş Emri Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Belirli bir dönemde (genellikle aylık) oluşturulan toplam iş emri sayısı. Sektörel standart: ISO 9001 kalite yönetim sistemi kapsamında iş emri takibi.

inputs.label: Tamamlanan İş Emri Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Aynı dönemde tamamlanan iş emri sayısı. İş emri kapanış oranı hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Toplam Teklif Tutarı (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Dönem içinde müşterilere sunulan yedek parça ve işçilik tekliflerinin toplam tutarı. Finansal analizde gelir potansiyeli olarak değerlendirilir.

inputs.label: Onaylanan Teklif Tutarı (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Müşteri tarafından onaylanan tekliflerin toplam tutarı. Teklif kabul oranı hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Yedek Parça Maliyeti (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Kullanılan yedek parçaların toplam maliyeti. Maliyet analizi ve kar marjı hesaplamalarında temel girdi.

inputs.label: İşçilik Saat Ücreti (TL/saat)
inputs.businessContext: Servis işçiliği için saatlik ücret. Sektörel benchmark: TÜİK verileri ve oto servis dernekleri.

inputs.label: Toplam İşçilik Saati (saat)
inputs.businessContext: Dönem içinde harcanan toplam işçilik saati. Verimlilik hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

inputs.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük: tahmini veriler, Orta: kısmi kayıtlı, Yüksek: tam kayıtlı. Risk yönetimi için kullanılır.

thresholds.isEmriTamamlanmaOrani < 0.5: Düşük iş emri tamamlanma oranı, operasyonel verimsizlik göstergesi
thresholds.teklifKabulOrani < 0.3: Düşük teklif kabul oranı, fiyatlandırma veya hizmet kalitesi sorunu
thresholds.karMarji < 0.1: Düşük kar marjı, maliyet kontrolü veya fiyatlandırma revizyonu gerekli

suggestedActions: isEmriTamamlanmaOrani < 0.5 ? 'İş akışını iyileştirin, darboğazları tespit edin' : ''
teklifKabulOrani < 0.3 ? 'Fiyatlandırma stratejisini gözden geçirin, müşteri geri bildirimi alın' : ''
karMarji < 0.1 ? 'Maliyetleri düşürün veya fiyatları artırın' : ''

inputs.label: Paint Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of paint to be used. Based on manufacturer specifications and ASTM D2697.

inputs.label: Coverage Rate
inputs.businessContext: Typical coverage per liter; varies by paint type and surface. Refer to ISO 8501 for surface preparation standards.

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Number of coats applied. Industry standard for most applications is 2 coats.

inputs.label: Surface Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be painted. Measured per project specifications.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of paint wasted due to overspray, spillage, etc. Typical range 5-15% based on Lean manufacturing principles.

inputs.label: Paint Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of paint affects coverage rate and application method. Refer to ASTM D5146 for paint testing.

inputs.label: Surface Condition
inputs.businessContext: Surface texture impacts paint absorption and coverage. Based on ISO 8501 surface preparation grades.

inputs.label: Application Method
inputs.businessContext: Method affects transfer efficiency and waste. Spray has higher waste; brush/roller more efficient.

thresholds.wasteFactor > 20: High waste factor; consider improving application technique.
thresholds.coverageRate < 5: Low coverage rate; check paint quality or surface preparation.
thresholds.numberOfCoats > 3: Multiple coats may indicate poor coverage; consider primer.

suggestedActions: if wasteFactor > 20 then 'Use spray shield or improve technique'
if coverageRate < 5 then 'Consider primer or surface preparation'
if numberOfCoats > 3 then 'Use high-hide paint or primer'

inputs.label: Paint Type
inputs.businessContext: Different paint types have different coverage rates and costs per liter. Based on industry standards (ASTM D2805).

inputs.label: Surface Area to Paint
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be painted. Measured in square meters per ISO 9001 quality standards.

inputs.label: Coverage per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Coverage rate depends on paint type and surface porosity. Typical values from manufacturer datasheets (ASTM D2805).

inputs.label: Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Purchase cost of paint per liter. Market prices vary by brand and quality.

inputs.label: Number of Coats
inputs.businessContext: Typically 2 coats for standard coverage. More coats may be needed for dark colors or porous surfaces.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for painters. Includes overhead per industrial engineering standards (Maynard).

inputs.label: Labor Productivity
inputs.businessContext: Area painted per hour per worker. Based on time studies (Salvendy).

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of paint wasted due to overspray, spillage, etc. Lean manufacturing principles target waste reduction.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Affects output adjustment for risk analysis.

rules: if paintType == 'oil' then coveragePerLiter <= 15 (typical oil coverage lower)

thresholds.wasteFactor > 20: High waste factor indicates inefficiency; consider process improvement (Lean).
thresholds.coveragePerLiter < 8: Low coverage may indicate poor paint quality or incorrect application.
thresholds.laborProductivity < 10: Low productivity; consider training or method improvement (Six Sigma).

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 20 ? 'Implement waste reduction techniques (e.g., proper spray settings, training)' : ''
coveragePerLiter < 8 ? 'Consider higher quality paint or surface preparation' : ''
laborProductivity < 10 ? 'Provide training or use more efficient tools' : ''

inputs.label: Job Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from the painting job, typically specified in contract. Based on standard job costing principles (Maynard Industrial Engineering Handbook).

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of paint, primer, and other materials. Includes waste factor. Referenced from construction estimating standards (RSMeans).

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total direct labor hours for the job. Based on time studies or historical data (Lean/Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including burden. Industry benchmark from Bureau of Labor Statistics.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of renting or using painting equipment (sprayers, scaffolding). Based on equipment lifecycle cost (ISO 15663).

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 10-20% for painting contractors (industry standard).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of area requiring rework due to defects. Six Sigma target <1%. Based on quality standards (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit Area
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework one square foot of defective paint. Includes labor and material. Industry average from painting contractors.

inputs.label: Total Area Painted
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area to be painted. Key driver of job size. Standard unit in construction.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects final profit adjustment. Based on risk management (PMBOK).

thresholds.defectRate: defectRate > 5 -> 'High defect rate: consider process improvement'
thresholds.profitMargin: profitMargin < 10 -> 'Low profit margin: review costs or pricing'
thresholds.overheadPercent: overheadPercent > 20 -> 'Overhead above typical range: investigate indirect costs'

suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement quality control and training to reduce defects' : ''
overheadPercent > 20 ? 'Review overhead allocation and reduce indirect costs' : ''
profitMargin < 10 ? 'Negotiate higher price or reduce direct costs' : ''

inputs.label: Total Painted Area
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area painted in the period. Based on ISO 9001 quality management and standard industrial painting metrics.

inputs.label: Rework Area
inputs.businessContext: Area requiring rework due to defects. Derived from Six Sigma DPMO (Defects Per Million Opportunities) methodology.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework one square meter including labor, material, and overhead. Based on standard cost accounting principles.

inputs.label: Coverage Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of painted area that meets quality standards. Key performance indicator in painting operations.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment. Based on data quality assessment frameworks.

hiddenLossDrivers: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'High defect rate indicates process instability' : ''
coverageRatio < 90 ? 'Low coverage ratio suggests quality issues' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement root cause analysis and process improvement (e.g., Six Sigma DMAIC)' : ''
coverageRatio < 90 ? 'Review painting parameters and operator training' : ''
reworkCost > 1000 ? 'Consider automation or better quality control' : ''

inputs.label: Birim Tipi
inputs.businessContext: Sarfiyat hesaplanacak birim türü. Koli bazında streç film tüketimi yaygın olarak kullanılır.

inputs.label: Birim Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Sarfiyat hesaplanacak toplam birim sayısı. Üretim planına göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: Streç Film Genişliği
inputs.businessContext: Kullanılan streç film rulosunun genişliği. Standart ölçüler 50 cm'dir.

inputs.label: Streç Film Kalınlığı
inputs.businessContext: Streç filmin mikron cinsinden kalınlığı. 15-25 mikron yaygındır.

inputs.label: Sarma Katman Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Her birim için sarılan streç film katman sayısı. Ambalaj gereksinimine göre değişir.

inputs.label: Bindirme Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Streç filmin her turda bir önceki tura bindirme oranı. Genelde %30-50 arası.

inputs.label: Streç Film Yoğunluğu
inputs.businessContext: Streç film malzemesinin yoğunluğu. Polietilen için yaklaşık 0.92 g/cm³.

inputs.label: Birim Uzunluğu
inputs.businessContext: Bir kolinin uzunluğu. Ortalama koli boyutlarına göre.

inputs.label: Birim Genişliği
inputs.businessContext: Bir kolinin genişliği.

inputs.label: Birim Yüksekliği
inputs.businessContext: Bir kolinin yüksekliği.

inputs.label: Streç Film Birim Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Streç filmin kilogram başına maliyeti. Güncel piyasa fiyatı.

inputs.label: Fire Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Streç film kullanımındaki fire oranı. Operasyonel kayıplar.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik yüzdesi. Düşükse sonuç düzeltilir.

thresholds.wasteRate > 10: Fire oranı %10'un üzerinde, süreç iyileştirme önerilir.
thresholds.wrapLayers > 5: Katman sayısı 5'ten fazla, maliyet artışına dikkat.

suggestedActions: Fire oranını azaltmak için eğitim ve süreç iyileştirme yapın.
Katman sayısını optimize ederek maliyeti düşürün.
Streç film kalınlığını gereksinime göre ayarlayın.

inputs.label: Palet Tipi
inputs.businessContext: Palet tipi, standart boyutları ve taşıma kapasitesini belirler. EUR palet (800x1200 mm) ve ISO palet (1000x1200 mm) yaygın standartlardır. ISO 6780 standardına dayanır.

inputs.label: Kereste Türü
inputs.businessContext: Kereste türü, yoğunluk ve dayanıklılık açısından farklılık gösterir. Çam yaygın kullanılır, meşe daha dayanıklıdır. ISO 445 standardına referans.

inputs.label: Palet Miktarı
inputs.businessContext: Üretilecek palet sayısı. Toplam kereste ihtiyacını ve maliyeti hesaplamak için temel girdi.

inputs.label: Kereste Nem Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Kerestenin nem içeriği, ağırlık ve dayanıklılığı etkiler. İdeal nem %12-15 arasıdır. ISO 4470 standardı.

inputs.label: Kereste Yoğunluğu
inputs.businessContext: Kerestenin kuru yoğunluğu. Çam için ~500 kg/m³, meşe için ~700 kg/m³. Ağırlık hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

inputs.label: İşçilik Saat Ücreti
inputs.businessContext: İşçilik maliyeti, üretim maliyetinin önemli bir bileşenidir. Asgari ücret ve sektörel ortalamalar dikkate alınır.

inputs.label: Makine Saat Ücreti
inputs.businessContext: Makine amortismanı, bakım ve enerji maliyetlerini içerir. Endüstri mühendisliği maliyet hesaplamaları.

inputs.label: Palet Başına Üretim Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Bir paletin üretilmesi için gereken süre. Lean üretimde standart zaman etüdü ile belirlenir.

inputs.label: Hata Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Üretimdeki hatalı palet oranı. Six Sigma kalite hedefleri ile ilişkilidir. Genellikle %2-5 arası.

inputs.label: Kereste Birim Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Kerestenin metreküp başına satın alma maliyeti. Piyasa fiyatlarına göre değişir.

inputs.label: Genel Gider Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Direkt maliyetlere eklenen genel gider yüzdesi. Muhasebe standartlarına göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: Kar Marjı
inputs.businessContext: Hedeflenen kar marjı. Finansal planlama ve fiyatlandırma stratejisi.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar ayarlanır.

thresholds.defectRate > 5: Hata oranı %5'in üzerinde, kalite iyileştirme gerekli.
thresholds.woodMoisture > 18: Nem oranı yüksek, kurutma maliyeti artabilir.

suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Kalite kontrol sürecini iyileştirin, Poka-Yoke uygulayın.' : ''
woodMoisture > 18 ? 'Kereste kurutma süresini artırın.' : ''
productionTimePerPallet > 10 ? 'Üretim hattını SMED ile optimize edin.' : ''
costPerPallet > 100 ? 'Maliyet düşürme fırsatlarını değerlendirin.' : ''

inputs.label: Total Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue from panel shop operations. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Direct material costs including panels, fasteners, and consumables. Referenced from standard cost accounting practices.

inputs.label: Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor costs including wages, benefits, and overtime. Based on industrial engineering labor standards (Maynard).

inputs.label: Overhead Cost
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs such as utilities, rent, equipment depreciation. Referenced from activity-based costing (ABC) principles.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of panels requiring rework or scrap. Six Sigma quality metric; threshold >0.05 triggers critical warning.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used to adjust final margin for uncertainty. Based on risk assessment standards (ISO 31000).

thresholds.defectRate: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'CRITICAL: Defect rate exceeds 5% threshold. Immediate quality improvement required.' : ''

hiddenLossDrivers: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'High defect rate causing significant hidden losses.' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement Six Sigma DMAIC project to reduce defect rate.' : 'Maintain current quality control processes.'
marginRate < 0.1 ? 'Review pricing strategy and cost reduction opportunities.' : 'Margin is healthy; consider investment in capacity expansion.'

inputs.label: Numune Kütlesi
inputs.businessContext: Numunenin hassas terazi ile ölçülen kütlesi. ISO 9001 kalite yönetim sisteminde ölçüm doğruluğu için kalibrasyon şartı.

inputs.label: Numune Hacmi
inputs.businessContext: Su taşırma yöntemi veya geometrik hesapla bulunan hacim. ASTM D792 standardına uygun.

inputs.label: Malzeme Türü
inputs.businessContext: Kullanıcının tahmini; hesaplama sonucu ile karşılaştırılır.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni
inputs.businessContext: Ölçüm hassasiyetine bağlı güven seviyesi. Endüstriyel ölçümlerde tipik olarak %95 kullanılır.

thresholds.density: density < 2.5 || density > 8.0 -> 'Beklenmeyen yoğunluk değeri, ölçümleri kontrol edin'

hiddenLossDrivers: density < 2.5 || density > 8.0 ? 'Beklenmeyen yoğunluk değeri, ölçümleri kontrol edin' : ''
suggestedActions: materialResult === 'tanimsiz' ? 'Ölçümleri tekrarlayın veya farklı bir yöntem kullanın' : 'Malzeme tespit edildi'

inputs.label: Value
inputs.businessContext: The base value for percentage calculation. Typically represents a quantity or amount.

inputs.label: Percentage
inputs.businessContext: The percentage to apply to the value. Standard percentage range 0-100.

inputs.label: Calculation Mode
inputs.businessContext: Select the type of percentage calculation: percentageOf (X% of Y), percentageChange (increase/decrease from base), valueFromPercentage (find base from percentage and result).

inputs.label: Base Value
inputs.businessContext: The base value for percentage change calculations. Required when mode is 'percentageChange'.

inputs.label: Result Value
inputs.businessContext: The resulting value for valueFromPercentage mode. Required when mode is 'valueFromPercentage'.

rules: If mode == 'percentageChange' then baseValue must be non-zero.
If mode == 'valueFromPercentage' then resultValue must be non-zero and percentage must be non-zero.
percentage must be between 0 and 100 inclusive.

inputs.label: Original Value
inputs.businessContext: The initial value before increase. Used in financial analysis and performance measurement. No specific standard, but common in percentage change calculations.

inputs.label: New Value
inputs.businessContext: The value after increase. Must be greater than or equal to original value for positive increase. Used in KPI tracking.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty. Common in risk analysis.

suggestedActions: If extreme increase: 'Review data sources for errors.'
If negative increase: 'Check if inputs are swapped.'

inputs.label: Toplam Çalışan Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Toplam çalışan sayısı, devamsızlık maliyetinin hesaplanmasında temel birimdir. ISO 9001:2015 kalite yönetim sistemi kapsamında insan kaynağı verisi olarak kullanılır.

inputs.label: Devamsızlık Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Yıllık devamsızlık oranı (planlı ve plansız). Lean üretimde OEE hesaplamalarında kullanılan bir metriktir. Kaynak: APICS Dictionary.

inputs.label: Ortalama Günlük Ücret
inputs.businessContext: Çalışan başına ortalama günlük brüt ücret. İşgücü maliyeti hesaplamalarında kullanılır. Kaynak: Türkiye İstatistik Kurumu (TÜİK) işgücü maliyeti istatistikleri.

inputs.label: Yıllık Çalışma Günü Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Yıllık fiili çalışma günü sayısı (resmi tatiller ve hafta sonları hariç). İş Kanunu ve 4857 sayılı İş Kanunu'na göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: Fazla Mesai Maliyet Çarpanı
inputs.businessContext: Devamsızlık nedeniyle yapılan fazla mesainin saatlik ücrete göre çarpanı. İş Kanunu'na göre fazla mesai ücreti normal ücretin %50 fazlasıdır (1.5 kat).

inputs.label: Günlük Yedek İşgücü Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Devamsız çalışanın yerine geçici işçi veya fazla mesai ile işin yapılması durumunda oluşan ek maliyet. Kaynak: Endüstri mühendisliği işgücü planlaması.

inputs.label: Verimlilik Kaybı Yüzdesi
inputs.businessContext: Devamsızlık nedeniyle ekip verimliliğindeki düşüş oranı. Lean üretimde kayıp analizi için kullanılır. Kaynak: Maynard Endüstri Mühendisliği El Kitabı.

inputs.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güvenilirlikte sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır. Risk yönetimi prensiplerine dayanır.

thresholds.absenceRate: absenceRate > 10 ? 'Kritik: Devamsızlık oranı sektör ortalamasının üzerinde (genelde %5-10).' : absenceRate > 5 ? 'Uyarı: Devamsızlık oranı yüksek.' : ''
thresholds.productivityLossPercent: productivityLossPercent > 30 ? 'Kritik: Verimlilik kaybı çok yüksek.' : productivityLossPercent > 15 ? 'Uyarı: Verimlilik kaybı önemli.' : ''

suggestedActions: Devamsızlık nedenlerini analiz etmek için kök neden analizi yapın.
Esnek çalışma saatleri veya uzaktan çalışma seçeneklerini değerlendirin.
Çalışan bağlılığını artırmak için motivasyon programları uygulayın.
Yedek işgücü planlamasını optimize edin.

inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the wall to be plastered. Standard construction measurement.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the wall. Standard construction measurement.

inputs.label: Plaster Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of plaster layer. Typical range 10-20 mm for internal walls.

inputs.label: Mix Ratio (Cement:Sand)
inputs.businessContext: Cement to sand ratio by volume. Common ratios: 1:4 for internal plaster, 1:3 for external.

inputs.label: Cement Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ per IS 875.

inputs.label: Sand Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Wastage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allowance for material wastage during mixing and application. Industry standard 5-10%.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of labor per square meter of plastering. Varies by region.

inputs.label: Cement Price
inputs.businessContext: Price per bag of cement (typically 50 kg).

inputs.label: Sand Price
inputs.businessContext: Price per cubic meter of sand.

thresholds.wastageFactor > 10: High wastage factor may indicate poor workmanship or material quality.
thresholds.plasterThickness > 20: Thick plaster may require multiple coats or structural assessment.
thresholds.laborRate > 20: Labor cost is above typical market rate.

suggestedActions: Use optimal mix ratio to reduce material cost.
Minimize wastage through proper workmanship.
Consider bulk purchasing of cement and sand for discounts.

inputs.label: Enjeksiyon Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Enjeksiyon süresi, plastiğin kalıba doldurulma süresidir. Standart: ISO 294-1.

inputs.label: Soğutma Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Soğutma süresi, parçanın kalıpta katılaşma süresidir. Standart: ISO 294-1.

inputs.label: Kalıp Açma/Kapama Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Kalıbın açılıp kapanması için geçen süre. Makine özelliklerine bağlıdır.

inputs.label: Parça Çıkarma Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Parçanın kalıptan çıkarılma süresi. Otomasyon seviyesine bağlıdır.

inputs.label: Bekleme Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Operatör veya robot bekleme süreleri. Lean prensiplerine göre minimize edilmelidir.

inputs.label: Çalışma Süresi (Vardiya)
inputs.businessContext: Bir vardiyadaki toplam çalışma süresi. ISO 9001 süreç yönetimi.

inputs.label: Planlı Duruş Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Bakım, molalar gibi planlı duruşlar. OEE hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

inputs.label: Kavite Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Kalıptaki göz sayısı. Çevrim başına üretilen parça sayısını belirler.

inputs.label: Fire Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Üretimdeki hatalı parça yüzdesi. Kalite standartları (ISO 9001) ile ilişkilidir.

inputs.label: Makine Kullanım Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Makinenin fiili çalışma oranı. OEE hesaplamasında kullanılır.

thresholds.fireOrani: fireOrani > 5 ? 'Yüksek fire oranı, kalite iyileştirme gerekli' : ''
thresholds.beklemeSuresi: beklemeSuresi > 5 ? 'Yüksek bekleme süresi, süreç iyileştirme önerilir' : ''

suggestedActions: fireOrani > 5 ? 'Kalite kontrol sürecini gözden geçirin ve parametre optimizasyonu yapın.' : ''
makineKullanimOrani < 70 ? 'Bakım planlamasını iyileştirin ve arıza sürelerini azaltın.' : ''
beklemeSuresi > 5 ? 'Operatör eğitimi ve otomasyon seviyesini artırın.' : ''

inputs.label: Fixture Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the type of plumbing fixture to evaluate. Based on standard plumbing categories (Uniform Plumbing Code).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of the fixture material (e.g., ceramic, metal). Typical range from industry suppliers.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Estimated labor hours for installation. Based on standard time studies (Maynard).

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Plumber's hourly wage including overhead. Industry average from Bureau of Labor Statistics.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of fixtures to install. Project scale factor.

inputs.label: Warranty Period
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer warranty period. Affects long-term cost. Standard warranty terms.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly maintenance cost (e.g., parts, service). Based on historical data.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate for NPV calculation. Typically company's cost of capital (CAPM).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor. Based on Six Sigma DMAIC.

rules: if fixtureType is 'toilet' then materialCost >= 50 (typical minimum)
if fixtureType is 'bathtub' then laborHours >= 3 (complex installation)

hiddenLossDrivers: if totalCostPerUnit > 1000 then 'High cost per unit'
if npvPerUnit < -100 then 'Negative net present value'
suggestedActions: if totalCostPerUnit > 500 then 'Consider alternative fixture types or negotiate bulk pricing'
if npvPerUnit < 0 then 'Extend warranty or reduce maintenance cost'
if laborHours > 3 then 'Evaluate installation efficiency (Lean methods)'

inputs.label: Job Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from the plumbing job. Based on contract value.

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of materials used in the job. Includes pipes, fittings, fixtures.

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total labor hours spent on the job.

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including burden. Industry standard.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Based on company accounting.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of equipment rental or depreciation for the job.

inputs.label: Subcontractor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of any subcontractors used.

inputs.label: Warranty Reserve
inputs.businessContext: Reserve for potential warranty claims. Typically 2-5% of revenue.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted margin.

suggestedActions: marginPercent < 0 ? 'Renegotiate price or reduce costs immediately' : ''
marginPercent < 10 ? 'Review material sourcing and labor efficiency' : ''
overheadRate > 30 ? 'Investigate overhead allocation' : ''

inputs.label: Annual Leak Events
inputs.businessContext: Number of plumbing leak incidents per year. Based on industry benchmarks from insurance data and facility management standards (e.g., BOMA).

inputs.label: Average Callback Cost per Event
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per callback, including labor, materials, and overhead. Derived from contractor pricing and historical data.

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for plumbers or maintenance staff. Based on prevailing wage surveys and union contracts.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Event
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of replacement parts and supplies per leak event. Based on supplier pricing and typical repair scope.

inputs.label: Downtime Hours per Event
inputs.businessContext: Average facility downtime per leak event, affecting operations. Based on facility management standards (IFMA).

inputs.label: Hourly Facility Downtime Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of lost productivity or revenue per hour of facility downtime. Based on business impact analysis.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Low = ±20%, Medium = ±10%, High = ±5%. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.annualLeakEvents > 50: High frequency of leaks indicates systemic issue

suggestedActions: Implement preventive maintenance program to reduce leak frequency
Negotiate bulk pricing for materials to lower material cost
Train staff to reduce callback rate and labor hours
Install leak detection systems to minimize downtime

inputs.label: Piston Çapı
inputs.businessContext: Piston çapı, silindirin kuvvet üretiminde temel parametredir. ISO 15552 standardına göre standart çaplar kullanılır.

inputs.label: Piston Kolu Çapı
inputs.businessContext: Piston kolu çapı, özellikle geri dönüş kuvveti hesaplamalarında kullanılır. ISO 15552 standardına göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: Çalışma Basıncı
inputs.businessContext: Pnömatik sistemlerde tipik çalışma basıncı 6 bar'dır. ISO 8573-1 standardına göre basınç değerleri belirlenir.

inputs.label: Verim
inputs.businessContext: Silindirin mekanik verimi, sürtünme ve sızdırmazlık kayıplarını hesaba katar. Tipik değer %90'dır.

inputs.label: Hareket Yönü
inputs.businessContext: İleri hareket, piston çapına bağlı kuvvet; geri hareket, piston kolu çapı düşülerek hesaplanır.

thresholds.kuvvet < 100: Düşük kuvvet, silindir seçimi gözden geçirilmeli
thresholds.kuvvet > 10000: Yüksek kuvvet, yapısal dayanım kontrol edilmeli

hiddenLossDrivers: verim < 80 ? 'Düşük verim, sızdırmazlık elemanları kontrol edilmeli' : ''
suggestedActions: kuvvet < 100 ? 'Daha büyük çaplı silindir seçin' : ''
kuvvet > 10000 ? 'Yapısal analiz yapın' : ''

inputs.label: Annual Defect Cost (before Poka-Yoke)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of defects per year including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost sales. Based on Six Sigma cost of poor quality (COPQ) principles.

inputs.label: Expected Defect Reduction Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage reduction in defects expected from implementing Poka-Yoke. Typical range 50-99% based on Lean case studies.

inputs.label: Total Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for design, purchase, installation, and training for the Poka-Yoke device. Includes engineering hours and materials.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring cost for upkeep, calibration, and spare parts of the Poka-Yoke system.

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the Poka-Yoke solution before major overhaul or replacement.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital or required rate of return. Used for NPV calculation per corporate finance standards.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment in final output. Low = 0.8, Medium = 1.0, High = 1.2 multiplier.

thresholds.defectReductionRate < 50: Low reduction rate; consider alternative solutions.
thresholds.annualDefectCost < 10000: Small defect cost; investment may not be justified.
thresholds.paybackPeriod > projectLifeYears: Payback exceeds project life; investment not viable.

formulas.irr: internal rate of return solving npv=0

hiddenLossDrivers: annualDefectCost < 10000 ? 'Low defect cost may not justify investment' : ''
paybackPeriod > projectLifeYears ? 'Payback period exceeds project life' : ''
suggestedActions: If NPV < 0: Consider reducing implementation cost or increasing defect reduction rate.
If paybackPeriod > 2 years: Explore faster payback options or phased implementation.
If dataConfidence is low: Gather more accurate defect cost data before proceeding.

inputs.label: Debi (Q)
inputs.businessContext: Pompa debisi, birim zamanda taşınan akışkan hacmi. ISO 9906 standardına göre ölçülür.

inputs.label: Basma Yüksekliği (H)
inputs.businessContext: Pompanın akışkana sağladığı toplam yükseklik (statik + kayıplar). ISO 9906'ya göre hesaplanır.

inputs.label: Akışkan Yoğunluğu (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Akışkanın yoğunluğu. Su için 1000 kg/m³, diğer akışkanlar için tablo değerleri kullanılır.

inputs.label: Pompa Verimi (η)
inputs.businessContext: Pompanın mekanik verimi. Tipik değerler %50-90 arası. ISO 9906'da tanımlıdır.

inputs.label: Elektrik Birim Fiyatı
inputs.businessContext: Enerji maliyeti hesaplaması için kullanılır. Güncel piyasa fiyatı.

inputs.label: Günlük Çalışma Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Pompanın günlük ortalama çalışma süresi.

inputs.label: Yıllık Çalışma Günü
inputs.businessContext: Pompanın yıllık çalışma günü sayısı.

thresholds.verim < 50: Düşük verim: pompa verimi %50'nin altında, bakım veya değişim gerekebilir.
thresholds.guc > 100: Yüksek güç: pompa gücü 100 kW üzerinde, enerji maliyeti yüksek.

suggestedActions: verim < 50 ? 'Pompa bakımı veya değişimi değerlendirin.' : ''
guc > 100 ? 'Enerji verimliliği analizi yapın.' : ''

inputs.label: Total Cost of Batch
inputs.businessContext: Total cost incurred to produce the entire batch, including raw materials, labor, and overhead. Based on standard cost accounting principles (e.g., GAAP).

inputs.label: Batch Size (Number of Portions)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of portions produced in the batch. Used to calculate cost per portion. Standard in production planning.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of batch lost due to waste (e.g., trimming, spoilage). Based on lean manufacturing principles (e.g., muda reduction).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly labor cost including wages and benefits. Used to allocate labor cost per portion. Standard in cost accounting.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Total labor hours required to produce the batch. Used to compute labor cost per portion.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Overhead cost as a percentage of direct costs (materials + labor). Based on standard cost allocation methods (e.g., activity-based costing).

inputs.label: Desired Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin on cost. Used to calculate selling price per portion. Common in pricing strategy.

thresholds.wastePercentage > 10: High waste percentage detected; consider process improvement.
thresholds.overheadRate > 50: Overhead rate exceeds 50%; review overhead allocation.

suggestedActions: Reduce waste through better portion control or process optimization.
Review overhead allocation and reduce non-value-added activities.
Consider increasing batch size to spread fixed costs.

inputs.label: Konteyner Boyutu (m²)
inputs.businessContext: Konteyner ofislerin standart boyutları genellikle 10-100 m² arasındadır. ISO standartlarına göre konteyner ölçüleri belirlenir.

inputs.label: Birim Maliyet (TL/m²)
inputs.businessContext: Prefabrik konteyner ofislerin metrekare başına maliyeti; malzeme, işçilik ve nakliye gibi faktörlere bağlıdır. Sektörel benchmarklar kullanılır.

inputs.label: Ekipman Maliyeti (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Konteyner içi ekipman (masa, sandalye, klima vb.) maliyetini ifade eder. İhtiyaca göre değişir.

inputs.label: Nakliye Maliyeti (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Konteynerin şantiyeye taşınması için gerekli nakliye ücreti. Mesafe ve lojistik faktörlere bağlıdır.

inputs.label: Montaj Maliyeti (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Konteynerin kurulumu ve montajı için işçilik maliyeti.

inputs.label: Ekstra Donanım (TL)
inputs.businessContext: İsteğe bağlı ek donanımlar (ısıtma, soğutma, elektrik tesisatı vb.) için maliyet.

inputs.label: İskonto Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: Toplam maliyete uygulanacak iskonto oranı. Pazarlık veya toplu alım durumlarında kullanılır.

thresholds.birimMaliyet > 10000: Birim maliyet yüksek, alternatif tedarikçiler değerlendirilmeli.
thresholds.toplamMaliyet > 100000: Toplam maliyet bütçeyi aşabilir, gözden geçirin.

formulas.toplamMaliyet: ((konteynerBoyutu * birimMaliyet) + ekipmanMaliyeti + nakliyeMaliyeti + montajMaliyeti + ekstraDonanim) * (1 - iskontoOrani / 100)

suggestedActions: Birim maliyeti düşürmek için alternatif malzeme veya tedarikçi araştırın.
Toplu alımda iskonto oranını artırmayı deneyin.
Ekipman maliyetlerini optimize etmek için ikinci el veya kiralama seçeneklerini değerlendirin.

inputs.label: Container Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard container lengths per ISO 668. Typical lengths: 6m, 12m.

inputs.label: Container Width (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard width per ISO 668. Typical width: 2.4m.

inputs.label: Container Height (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard height per ISO 668. Typical heights: 2.6m (standard), 2.9m (high cube).

inputs.label: Wall Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Insulation and structural thickness. Common values: 50mm, 75mm, 100mm.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Structural material. Steel is most common for durability; aluminum for lightweight; composite for insulation.

inputs.label: Has Insulation
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if container includes thermal insulation. Affects usable internal dimensions.

inputs.label: Door Type
inputs.businessContext: Door configuration affects opening width and usable space.

inputs.label: Number of Windows
inputs.businessContext: Windows reduce wall area but improve natural lighting. Typical range 0-4.

inputs.label: Floor Type
inputs.businessContext: Floor material affects load capacity and durability.

rules: if (hasInsulation == false) then wallThickness >= 30 else wallThickness >= 50

thresholds.internalVolume: if internalVolume < 10 then 'Small container' else if internalVolume < 30 then 'Medium container' else 'Large container'

hiddenLossDrivers: if internalVolume < 10 then 'Volume too small for standard use'
if wallThickness > 80 then 'Excessive insulation reduces internal space'
suggestedActions: if internalVolume < 10 then 'Consider increasing container dimensions or reducing wall thickness'
if wallThickness > 80 then 'Evaluate if heavy insulation is necessary; consider alternative materials'

inputs.label: Design Pressure (Internal)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable working pressure per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-21.

inputs.label: Vessel Inner Radius
inputs.businessContext: Inner radius of cylindrical shell per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-27.

inputs.label: Allowable Stress of Material
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable stress value per ASME BPVC Section II Part D, Table 1A.

inputs.label: Joint Efficiency (Longitudinal)
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of welded joints per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UW-12. Values correspond to joint categories and degree of radiography.

inputs.label: Corrosion Allowance
inputs.businessContext: Additional thickness to account for corrosion over design life per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-25.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Material classification for corrosion allowance and stress values.

thresholds.designPressure > 20: High pressure vessel, consider special design per ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.2
thresholds.corrosionAllowance > 5: Excessive corrosion allowance, verify material selection

hiddenLossDrivers: designPressure > 20 ? 'High pressure may require thicker wall' : ''
suggestedActions: Verify material allowable stress with ASME Section II Part D
Consider increasing joint efficiency with full radiography
Review corrosion allowance based on expected service life

premiumFeatures: Comparison with ASME Section VIII Div.2

inputs.label: Paper Cost per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Cost of paper per sheet based on supplier pricing and grade. Standard cost accounting practice.

inputs.label: Ink Cost per ml
inputs.businessContext: Cost of ink per milliliter based on cartridge yield and price. Industry standard for print cost estimation.

inputs.label: Ink Usage per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Average ink consumption per sheet, varies by coverage. Derived from printer specifications or test prints.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of operator including overhead. Standard labor costing in manufacturing.

inputs.label: Setup Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time to prepare the print job (loading paper, calibrating). Lean manufacturing setup time reduction focus.

inputs.label: Run Time per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Printing speed per sheet. Derived from printer specifications.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of sheets to be printed. Job order quantity.

inputs.label: Waste Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected waste percentage due to misprints or setup waste. Six Sigma defect rate consideration.

inputs.label: Machine Depreciation per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly depreciation cost of printing equipment. Capital cost allocation.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Electricity cost per kilowatt-hour. ISO 50001 energy management.

inputs.label: Power Consumption (kW)
inputs.businessContext: Average power draw of the printer during operation. Energy efficiency metric.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly maintenance cost including parts and service. Total productive maintenance (TPM) consideration.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

thresholds.wasteRate > 10: High waste rate detected, consider process improvement.
thresholds.setupTimeMinutes > 30: Long setup time, consider SMED techniques.
thresholds.inkUsagePerSheet > 0.2: High ink usage, check coverage settings.

formulas.totalMaterialCost: paperCostPerSheet * quantity * (1 + wasteRate/100) + inkCostPerMl * inkUsagePerSheet * quantity * (1 + wasteRate/100)

suggestedActions: wasteRate > 10 ? 'Reduce waste by calibrating printers and using better paper handling.' : ''
setupTimeMinutes > 30 ? 'Implement SMED to reduce setup time.' : ''
inkUsagePerSheet > 0.2 ? 'Optimize print settings for ink efficiency.' : ''

inputs.label: Total Print Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of printed units in the period. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Reprint Volume
inputs.businessContext: Number of units reprinted due to defects or errors. Key metric in Lean manufacturing (defect rate).

inputs.label: Unit Price
inputs.businessContext: Selling price per unit. Standard financial input.

inputs.label: Unit Cost
inputs.businessContext: Variable cost per unit (materials, labor, overhead). Based on cost accounting standards.

inputs.label: Reprint Cost Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for cost of reprint vs. original run (e.g., due to setup waste). Industry benchmark: 1.2-2.0.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment of results. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

hiddenLossDrivers: reprintRate > 0.05 ? 'High reprint rate indicates process instability' : ''
marginLeakPerUnit > 0.1 ? 'Margin leak per unit exceeds 10% of original margin' : ''
suggestedActions: reprintRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement root cause analysis (RCA) and reduce defect rate via Six Sigma DMAIC' : ''
marginLeakPerUnit > 0.1 ? 'Review reprint cost factor; consider SMED to reduce setup waste' : ''

inputs.label: Probability of Event A
inputs.businessContext: Base probability of event A occurring. Used in basic probability calculations. Referenced from probability theory fundamentals.

inputs.label: Probability of Event B
inputs.businessContext: Base probability of event B occurring. Used in joint and conditional probability calculations.

inputs.label: Conditional Probability P(B|A)
inputs.businessContext: Probability of B given A. Required for Bayes' theorem and conditional probability analysis.

inputs.label: Calculation Mode
inputs.businessContext: Select the type of probability calculation: joint (P(A∩B)), conditional (P(A|B)), Bayes (P(A|B) from P(B|A)), complement (P(not A)), union (P(A∪B)).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data (0 to 1). Used to adjust output for uncertainty. Typical values: 0.9, 0.95, 0.99.

rules: If calculationMode is 'conditional' or 'bayes', eventAProbability must be > 0
If calculationMode is 'bayes', conditionalProbability must be provided

thresholds.eventAProbability: if eventAProbability < 0.01 then 'Very low probability event A'
thresholds.eventBProbability: if eventBProbability < 0.01 then 'Very low probability event B'
thresholds.conditionalProbability: if conditionalProbability < 0.01 then 'Very low conditional probability'

hiddenLossDrivers: Low probability values may indicate rare events requiring special attention
Low data confidence reduces reliability of results
suggestedActions: Verify input probabilities with historical data
Increase sample size to improve data confidence
Use sensitivity analysis to assess impact of probability variations

inputs.label: Revenue per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average selling price per unit. Based on standard cost accounting principles (Horngren).

inputs.label: Units Sold
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity sold to customer over analysis period. From sales records.

inputs.label: Variable Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct materials, direct labor, variable overhead per unit. Based on standard costing (ABC).

inputs.label: Fixed Cost Allocation
inputs.businessContext: Allocated fixed costs (e.g., factory rent, equipment depreciation) for this product-customer. Based on activity-based costing (Kaplan).

inputs.label: Customer-Specific Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs directly attributable to customer (e.g., special packaging, logistics, sales support). From customer profitability analysis (Shapiro).

inputs.label: Discounts and Allowances
inputs.businessContext: Price discounts, trade allowances, rebates given to customer. Standard in trade spend analysis.

inputs.label: Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units returned by customer. Based on quality metrics (Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Cost of Capital
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) for the firm. Standard finance (Brealey & Myers).

inputs.label: Average Collection Period
inputs.businessContext: Days sales outstanding for this customer. From accounts receivable aging.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment (ISO 31000).

thresholds.returnRate: returnRate > 5 ? 'High return rate may indicate quality issues' : ''
thresholds.profitMargin: profitMargin < 0 ? 'Negative profit margin - review pricing or costs' : ''
thresholds.customerSpecificCosts: customerSpecificCosts > 0.2 * (revenuePerUnit * unitsSold) ? 'Customer-specific costs exceed 20% of revenue' : ''

suggestedActions: profitMargin < 0 ? 'Review pricing strategy or reduce costs' : ''
returnRate > 5 ? 'Implement quality improvement program (Six Sigma)' : ''
carryingCostOfReceivables > 0.05 * netRevenue ? 'Negotiate faster payment terms or offer discounts' : ''
customerSpecificCosts > 0.2 * (revenuePerUnit * unitsSold) ? 'Analyze and reduce customer-specific costs' : ''

inputs.label: Selling Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Revenue per unit sold. Standard pricing input for margin analysis.

inputs.label: Unit Cost (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of goods sold per unit, including materials, labor, and overhead. Based on standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Sales Volume (units per period)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units sold in the given period. Used to calculate total margin.

inputs.label: Period
inputs.businessContext: Time period for volume and margin calculation. Standard financial reporting periods.

inputs.label: Fixed Costs (per period)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed overhead costs allocated to the product. Based on absorption costing principles.

inputs.label: Variable Costs (per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Variable costs per unit beyond COGS, e.g., shipping, commissions. Standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Average discount or promotion applied to selling price. Common in retail and B2B pricing.

inputs.label: Return Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units returned. Impacts net revenue and cost. Based on quality and customer satisfaction metrics.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for adjusted margin calculation. Common in decision analysis.

hiddenLossDrivers: discountRate > 0.1 ? 'High discount rate reduces effective price' : ''
suggestedActions: grossMarginPercent < 0.2 ? 'Review pricing strategy or reduce variable costs' : ''
returnRate > 0.05 ? 'Investigate root causes of returns and improve quality' : ''
breakEvenUnits > volume ? 'Sales volume below break-even; consider cost reduction or price increase' : ''

inputs.label: Total Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue from goods or services. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to production. Includes materials, labor, overhead. Per standard cost accounting (IMA).

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Based on income statement structure.

inputs.label: Other Income
inputs.businessContext: Non-operating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for net profit margin.

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate. Based on jurisdiction (OECD average ~25%).

inputs.label: Interest Expense
inputs.businessContext: Cost of debt financing. Used to compute net profit margin.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Based on risk management practices (ISO 31000).

rules: if revenue > 0 then cogs + operatingExpenses <= revenue + otherIncome (gross profit check)

thresholds.grossProfitMargin: if grossProfitMargin < 0.2 then 'Low gross margin; review pricing or COGS'
thresholds.operatingProfitMargin: if operatingProfitMargin < 0.1 then 'Operating margin below 10%; consider cost reduction'
thresholds.netProfitMargin: if netProfitMargin < 0.05 then 'Net margin below 5%; profitability at risk'

formulas.netProfitMargin: ((revenue - cogs - operatingExpenses + otherIncome - interestExpense) * (1 - taxRate / 100)) / revenue

hiddenLossDrivers: if grossProfitMargin < 0.2 then 'Low gross margin; review pricing or COGS'
if operatingProfitMargin < 0.1 then 'Operating margin below 10%; consider cost reduction'
if netProfitMargin < 0.05 then 'Net margin below 5%; profitability at risk'
suggestedActions: If gross margin low: analyze COGS breakdown, negotiate supplier prices, improve production efficiency (Lean).
If operating margin low: reduce SG&A, automate processes, optimize inventory (JIT).
If net margin low: review tax strategy, refinance debt, diversify revenue streams.

inputs.label: Project Duration (months)
inputs.businessContext: Standard project timeline; typical range 1-120 months based on PMI guidelines.

inputs.label: Team Size (FTE)
inputs.businessContext: Full-time equivalent staff; common in resource planning per PMBOK.

inputs.label: Average Hourly Rate ($)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average labor cost; industry benchmarks from BLS or internal data.

inputs.label: Hours per Week per FTE
inputs.businessContext: Standard workweek; 40 hours typical, overtime possible up to 80.

inputs.label: Weeks per Month
inputs.businessContext: Average weeks per month (52/12 ≈ 4.33); used for monthly cost calculation.

inputs.label: Material Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Direct material expenses; includes raw materials, components, supplies.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Capital equipment or rental costs; depreciation may be considered.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Indirect cost allocation; typical range 10-50% based on industry (e.g., construction, IT).

inputs.label: Contingency Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Risk buffer; recommended 5-20% per PMI risk management.

inputs.label: Profit Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Target profit; varies by industry (e.g., 10-20% typical).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data; affects adjusted cost (low=+20%, medium=0%, high=-10%).

thresholds.overheadRate > 50: Overhead rate exceeds typical maximum; verify allocation.
thresholds.contingencyRate > 20: Contingency rate high; consider risk reassessment.
thresholds.profitMargin > 30: Profit margin unusually high; check market competitiveness.
thresholds.avgHourlyRate > 150: Hourly rate above typical; ensure justification.

suggestedActions: If overhead rate > 50%, review indirect cost allocation and reduce non-essential overhead.
If contingency rate > 20%, perform detailed risk analysis to justify or reduce buffer.
If profit margin > 30%, benchmark against industry standards to ensure competitiveness.
If hourly rate > 150, consider using blended rates or outsourcing lower-skill tasks.

inputs.label: Numerator (Part)
inputs.businessContext: The part value in a proportion calculation. Used in ratio analysis (e.g., defect count, cost component). Based on general mathematical proportion principles.

inputs.label: Denominator (Whole)
inputs.businessContext: The whole value in a proportion calculation. Must be positive to avoid division by zero. Used in ratio analysis (e.g., total production, total cost).

inputs.label: Scale Factor (e.g., per 100)
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to express proportion as a percentage (scale=100) or per mille (scale=1000). Default 1 gives raw ratio. Common in quality metrics (defects per million opportunities).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data quality. Used to adjust output reliability. Based on data quality management principles (ISO 8000).

thresholds.dataConfidence == 'low': Low data confidence; results may be unreliable.

suggestedActions: proportion > 1 ? 'Verify numerator and denominator values' : null
dataConfidence == 'low' ? 'Improve data collection process' : null

inputs.label: Total Sales Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Annual total sales revenue. Used as basis for cost ratios. Standard financial metric.

inputs.label: Prevention Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs of activities to prevent defects (e.g., training, process control). Based on PAF model (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Appraisal Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs of inspection and testing to detect defects. PAF model.

inputs.label: Internal Failure Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs from defects found before delivery (scrap, rework). PAF model.

inputs.label: External Failure Costs
inputs.businessContext: Costs from defects found after delivery (warranty, returns). PAF model.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty.

suggestedActions: totalQualityCostRatio > 0.15 ? 'Invest in prevention to reduce overall quality costs.' : ''
externalFailureRatio > 0.05 ? 'Improve outgoing quality control to reduce external failures.' : ''

inputs.label: Unit Cost (COGS per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost per unit including materials, labor, and overhead. Based on standard cost accounting (GAAP).

inputs.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin as percentage of selling price. Common industry benchmark: 10-30% for manufacturing.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs. Based on activity-based costing (ABC) principles.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units in the quote. Volume discounts may apply.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Negotiated discount off list price. Common in B2B sales.

inputs.label: Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax or VAT applicable to the transaction.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: ISO 4217 currency code for financial reporting.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

thresholds.desiredProfitMargin > 50: Warning: Desired profit margin is very high; may reduce competitiveness.
thresholds.discountRate > 30: Warning: High discount rate may erode profit margin.
thresholds.overheadRate > 40: Warning: Overhead rate is high; consider cost reduction.

hiddenLossDrivers: If overheadRate > 40: 'High overhead rate may indicate inefficiencies.'
suggestedActions: Review overhead allocation for cost reduction opportunities.
Consider volume discounts to improve competitiveness.
Negotiate better supplier pricing to lower unit cost.

inputs.label: Oda Hacmi (m³)
inputs.businessContext: Odanın hacmi, ısıtma ihtiyacını belirler. Standart: TS 2164 (Türk Standardı) ve DIN 4701 (Alman Isıtma Yükü Hesabı).

inputs.label: Yalıtım Seviyesi
inputs.businessContext: Binanın yalıtım kalitesi, ısı kaybını etkiler. TS 825 (Binalarda Isı Yalıtım Kuralları) esas alınır.

inputs.label: İstenen Oda Sıcaklığı (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Konfor sıcaklığı, genellikle 20-24°C arası. ASHRAE Standard 55 (Termal Konfor) referans alınır.

inputs.label: Dış Hava Sıcaklığı (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Tasarım dış sıcaklığı, bölgeye göre değişir. TS 2164'te bölgesel değerler verilir.

inputs.label: Radyatör Tipi
inputs.businessContext: Radyatör tipi, ısı çıkış gücünü (W/m) belirler. Üretici katalogları ve EN 442 standardı.

inputs.label: Sistem Su Sıcaklığı (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Kombi/kazan su sıcaklığı, radyatör ısı çıkışını etkiler. Tipik değer 75/65°C (gidiş/dönüş).

thresholds.yalitimSeviyesi_kotu: Yalıtım seviyesi 'kötü' ise ısı kaybı yüksek, radyatör boyu büyük olabilir.
thresholds.disSicaklik_cokDusuk: Dış sıcaklık -15°C altında ise donma riski, yalıtım kontrolü önerilir.

suggestedActions: Yalıtım seviyesi 'kötü' ise yalıtım iyileştirme önerilir.
Dış sıcaklık çok düşükse, pencere ve kapı sızdırmazlığı kontrol edilmelidir.
Radyatör tipi seçiminde panel radyatörler daha verimlidir.

inputs.label: Minimum Değer
inputs.businessContext: Rastgele sayı üretim aralığının alt sınırı. Mühendislik simülasyonlarında kullanılır.

inputs.label: Maksimum Değer
inputs.businessContext: Rastgele sayı üretim aralığının üst sınırı. Mühendislik simülasyonlarında kullanılır.

inputs.label: Adet
inputs.businessContext: Üretilecek rastgele sayı adedi. Monte Carlo simülasyonlarında örneklem büyüklüğü.

inputs.label: Dağılım Türü
inputs.businessContext: Rastgele sayıların hangi olasılık dağılımına göre üretileceği. Uniform: eşit olasılık; Normal: çan eğrisi; Exponential: üstel dağılım.

inputs.label: Ortalama (Normal Dağılım)
inputs.businessContext: Normal dağılım için ortalama değer. Dağılım türü normal seçildiğinde kullanılır.

inputs.label: Standart Sapma (Normal Dağılım)
inputs.businessContext: Normal dağılım için standart sapma. Dağılım türü normal seçildiğinde kullanılır.

inputs.label: Oran (Üstel Dağılım)
inputs.businessContext: Üstel dağılım için oran parametresi (λ). Dağılım türü exponential seçildiğinde kullanılır.

inputs.label: Tohum Değeri
inputs.businessContext: Rastgele sayı üretecinin başlangıç tohumu. Tekrarlanabilirlik için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni
inputs.businessContext: Üretilen sayıların güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük değerler sonuçların daha az güvenilir olduğunu belirtir.

rules: if distribution == 'normal' then mean != null and stdDev > 0

thresholds.stdDev > 100: Standart sapma çok yüksek, dağılım geniş.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 50: Veri güveni düşük, sonuçlar güvenilir olmayabilir.

formulas.generateRandomNumbers: if distribution == 'uniform' then randomNumbers = Array.from({length: count}, () => minValue + (maxValue - minValue) * Math.random()) else if distribution == 'normal' then randomNumbers = Array.from({length: count}, () => mean + stdDev * boxMullerTransform()) else if distribution == 'exponential' then randomNumbers = Array.from({length: count}, () => -Math.log(1 - Math.random()) / rate)
formulas.boxMullerTransform: let u = 0, v = 0; while(u === 0) u = Math.random(); while(v === 0) v = Math.random(); return Math.sqrt(-2.0 * Math.log(u)) * Math.cos(2.0 * Math.PI * v)

hiddenLossDrivers: if count > 1000 then 'Yüksek adet performansı etkileyebilir'
if stdDev > 100 then 'Standart sapma çok yüksek'
suggestedActions: count > 1000 ? 'Adeti azaltın veya daha verimli algoritma kullanın' : 'Adet uygun'
stdDev > 100 ? 'Dağılım parametrelerini kontrol edin' : 'Standart sapma normal'
dataConfidence < 50 ? 'Veri güvenini artırın' : 'Veri güveni yeterli'

inputs.label: Current Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total current assets from balance sheet. Standard financial ratio input.

inputs.label: Current Liabilities
inputs.businessContext: Total current liabilities from balance sheet. Standard financial ratio input.

inputs.label: Inventory
inputs.businessContext: Inventory value from balance sheet. Used for quick ratio.

inputs.label: Total Debt
inputs.businessContext: Total debt (short-term + long-term) from balance sheet.

inputs.label: Total Equity
inputs.businessContext: Total shareholders' equity from balance sheet.

inputs.label: Net Income
inputs.businessContext: Net profit from income statement.

inputs.label: Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from income statement.

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold
inputs.businessContext: COGS from income statement.

inputs.label: Average Inventory
inputs.businessContext: Average inventory over period (beginning + ending)/2.

inputs.label: Accounts Receivable
inputs.businessContext: Total accounts receivable from balance sheet.

inputs.label: Accounts Payable
inputs.businessContext: Total accounts payable from balance sheet.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total operating expenses from income statement.

inputs.label: Interest Expense
inputs.businessContext: Interest expense from income statement.

inputs.label: Tax Expense
inputs.businessContext: Tax expense from income statement.

inputs.label: EBITDA
inputs.businessContext: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, amortization.

inputs.label: Total Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total assets from balance sheet.

inputs.label: Operating Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Cash flow from operations.

inputs.label: Free Cash Flow
inputs.businessContext: Free cash flow (operating CF - capex).

inputs.label: Market Price Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Current stock price.

inputs.label: Earnings Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Net income / shares outstanding.

inputs.label: Book Value Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Total equity / shares outstanding.

inputs.label: Dividend Per Share
inputs.businessContext: Annual dividend per share.

inputs.label: Shares Outstanding
inputs.businessContext: Number of outstanding shares.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data quality. Adjusts output reliability.

rules: If currentLiabilities > 0 then currentAssets must be provided
If inventory > currentAssets then warning: inventory exceeds current assets

hiddenLossDrivers: currentRatio < threshold.criticalLow ? 'Critical liquidity risk: current ratio too low' : ''
debtToEquity > threshold.criticalHigh ? 'Critical leverage risk: debt to equity too high' : ''
profitMargin < threshold.criticalLow ? 'Critical profitability risk: net profit margin negative' : ''
inventoryTurnover < threshold.criticalLow ? 'Critical efficiency risk: inventory turnover too low' : ''
daysSalesOutstanding > threshold.criticalHigh ? 'Critical collection risk: DSO too high' : ''
timesInterestEarned < threshold.criticalLow ? 'Critical coverage risk: times interest earned below 1' : ''
suggestedActions: currentRatio < 1.0 ? 'Improve liquidity by increasing current assets or reducing current liabilities' : ''
debtToEquity > 1.5 ? 'Reduce debt or increase equity to improve leverage' : ''
profitMargin < 0.05 ? 'Review pricing strategy and cost control to improve profitability' : ''
inventoryTurnover < 4 ? 'Implement inventory management techniques (e.g., JIT, ABC analysis)' : ''
daysSalesOutstanding > 45 ? 'Strengthen accounts receivable collection process' : ''
timesInterestEarned < 2 ? 'Restructure debt or improve operating income' : ''

inputs.label: Rebar Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Standard rebar diameters per ASTM A615/A615M. Common sizes: 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28, 32, 36, 40, 50 mm.

inputs.label: Rebar Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of rebar piece. Typical stock lengths: 6m, 12m, 18m. User can input custom length.

inputs.label: Number of Rebars
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical rebars to calculate total weight.

inputs.label: Steel Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of steel. Standard value 7850 kg/m³ per ASTM A36. Variations for different steel grades.

inputs.label: Unit System
inputs.businessContext: Select unit system. Metric uses mm, m, kg. Imperial uses inch, ft, lb. Conversion factors applied.

rules: diameter must be between 6 and 50 mm
length must be positive and ≤ 100 m
steelDensity must be between 7800 and 7900 kg/m³

thresholds.diameter: diameter < 10 → 'Small diameter rebar, check structural requirements'

hiddenLossDrivers: diameter < 10 → 'Small diameter rebar, check structural requirements'
suggestedActions: Verify rebar grade and density with supplier
Consider using standard lengths to minimize waste
For large quantities, request volume discount

premiumFeatures: Trend analysis of weight vs diameter
Detailed report with material cost estimation

inputs.label: Hammadde Maliyeti (birim başına)
inputs.businessContext: Reçetedeki ana hammaddenin birim maliyeti. ISO 9001 maliyet yönetimi prensipleri esas alınır.

inputs.label: Alternatif Hammadde Maliyeti (birim başına)
inputs.businessContext: Alternatif hammaddenin birim maliyeti. Tedarikçi teklifleri veya piyasa araştırması ile belirlenir.

inputs.label: Kullanım Miktarı (birim ürün başına)
inputs.businessContext: Reçetede belirtilen hammadde miktarı. Ürün spesifikasyonlarına dayanır.

inputs.label: Üretim Adedi (dönemlik)
inputs.businessContext: Belirli bir dönemde (aylık/yıllık) üretilen ürün sayısı. Üretim planından alınır.

inputs.label: Alternatif Hammadde Verim Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Alternatif hammaddenin mevcut hammaddeye göre verimlilik oranı. Proses denemeleri ile belirlenir.

inputs.label: Kalite Kaybı Oranı (alternatif)
inputs.businessContext: Alternatif hammadde kullanımında oluşan fire/red oranı. Six Sigma kalite metrikleri.

inputs.label: Lojistik Maliyet Farkı (birim başına)
inputs.businessContext: Alternatif hammaddenin taşıma, depolama gibi lojistik maliyetlerindeki fark. Tedarik zinciri maliyet analizi.

inputs.label: Veri Güven Seviyesi
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük ise sonuçlar daha temkinli yorumlanmalı.

thresholds.maliyetTasarrufuYuzde: if maliyetTasarrufuYuzde < 0 then 'Alternatif hammadde daha pahalı, önerilmez'
thresholds.kaliteKaybiOrani: if kaliteKaybiOrani > 5 then 'Kalite kaybı yüksek, proses iyileştirme gerekli'

hiddenLossDrivers: if kaliteKaybiOrani > 5 then 'Kalite kaybı nedeniyle gizli maliyet artışı'
if alternatifVerimOrani < 90 then 'Düşük verim nedeniyle ek fire maliyeti'
suggestedActions: if maliyetTasarrufu > 0 then 'Alternatif hammadde kullanımı önerilir'
if kaliteKaybiOrani > 5 then 'Proses optimizasyonu veya kalite iyileştirme çalışması yapılmalı'
if alternatifVerimOrani < 95 then 'Alternatif hammadde tedarikçisi ile verim iyileştirme görüşmeleri yapılmalı'

inputs.label: Ingredient Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Standard cost accounting for raw materials; based on APICS dictionary and typical manufacturing cost breakdown.

inputs.label: Ingredient Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Recipe bill of materials; quantity per batch or per unit output.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost; includes wages and benefits; standard in cost accounting.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Time studies or standard labor hours; based on Maynard's Industrial Engineering Handbook.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing overhead as percentage of direct costs; typical in cost accounting.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced per batch; affects cost per unit.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Material waste or yield loss; based on Six Sigma DMAIC and lean manufacturing principles.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Energy cost for processing; ISO 50001 energy management standard.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Energy used per batch; from energy audits or equipment specs.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy; affects adjusted cost output.

thresholds.wastePercentage > 10: High waste percentage detected; consider process improvement.
thresholds.overheadRate > 50: Overhead rate exceeds typical range; review indirect costs.
thresholds.energyCostPerKwh > 0.15: Energy cost above benchmark; consider energy efficiency measures.

suggestedActions: Reduce waste through process optimization (Lean/Six Sigma).
Negotiate lower ingredient prices or find alternative suppliers.
Improve labor productivity via training or automation.
Review overhead allocation and reduce non-value-added activities.
Implement energy management system (ISO 50001) to lower energy costs.

inputs.label: Total Renovation Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be renovated in square meters. Based on industry standards for construction cost estimation (e.g., RICS New Rules of Measurement).

inputs.label: Unit Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per square meter for renovation, including materials and labor. Derived from local construction cost databases (e.g., RSMeans).

inputs.label: Labor Cost Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total cost allocated to labor. Typical range from industry benchmarks (e.g., 30-50% for renovation projects).

inputs.label: Material Cost Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total cost allocated to materials. Complement of labor and overhead percentages.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage for overhead costs (permits, insurance, management). Based on typical construction overhead rates.

inputs.label: Contingency Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Contingency reserve for unforeseen costs. Recommended 10-20% per project management standards (PMBOK).

inputs.label: Project Duration
inputs.businessContext: Expected duration of renovation project in months. Affects financing costs and escalation.

inputs.label: Annual Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate for construction costs. Based on economic forecasts (e.g., World Bank).

inputs.label: Annual Financing Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate for project financing. Based on current market rates (e.g., LIBOR + spread).

inputs.label: Annual Energy Savings
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual energy cost savings after renovation. Based on energy audit (ISO 50001).

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Savings
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual maintenance cost savings after renovation. Based on historical data.

inputs.label: Property Value Increase
inputs.businessContext: Expected increase in property value after renovation. Based on real estate appraisal standards.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level of input data. Affects risk adjustment. Low = 0.8, Medium = 0.9, High = 1.0 multiplier.

thresholds.contingencyPercentage > 20: High contingency indicates high risk; consider detailed risk assessment.
thresholds.financingRate > 10: Financing cost is high; explore alternative funding.
thresholds.energySavingsPerYear < 1000: Energy savings too low; verify energy audit.

suggestedActions: if paybackPeriod > 5 years: Consider phasing renovation to reduce upfront cost.
if roi < 0: Re-evaluate scope; focus on high-ROI measures.
if contingencyPercentage > 20: Perform detailed risk analysis.

inputs.label: Home Price
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price of the property. Standard real estate valuation.

inputs.label: Down Payment Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of home price paid upfront. Typical minimum 3-20% depending on loan type.

inputs.label: Mortgage Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate on mortgage. Based on current market rates.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of mortgage. Common terms: 15, 20, 30 years.

inputs.label: Property Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual property tax as percentage of home value. Varies by location.

inputs.label: Home Insurance Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual insurance cost as percentage of home value.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost Rate
