inputs.businessContext: Annual maintenance cost as percentage of home value. Rule of thumb: 1%.

inputs.label: HOA Fees (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Monthly homeowners association fees if applicable.

inputs.label: Closing Costs Percentage
inputs.businessContext: One-time closing costs as percentage of home price. Typically 2-5%.

inputs.label: Monthly Rent
inputs.businessContext: Monthly rent for comparable property.

inputs.label: Renter's Insurance (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Monthly cost of renter's insurance.

inputs.label: Security Deposit
inputs.businessContext: Refundable deposit paid upfront when renting.

inputs.label: Home Appreciation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual increase in home value. Historical average ~3-4%.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation rate. Used to discount future cash flows.

inputs.label: Investment Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual return on alternative investments (e.g., stock market).

inputs.label: Time Horizon (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Number of years you plan to stay in the home or rent.

inputs.label: Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Federal income tax bracket. Used to calculate mortgage interest tax deduction benefit.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability.

rules: if downPaymentPercent < 20 then mortgageRate must include PMI (not modeled separately)

thresholds.downPaymentPercent < 20: Low down payment may require PMI, increasing monthly cost.
thresholds.mortgageRate > 7: High mortgage rate significantly increases cost.
thresholds.timeHorizonYears < 5: Short time horizon may favor renting due to transaction costs.
thresholds.appreciationRate < 0: Negative appreciation could lead to loss.

formulas.monthlyMortgagePayment: loanAmount * (mortgageRate / 12 / 100) * Math.pow(1 + mortgageRate / 12 / 100, loanTermYears * 12) / (Math.pow(1 + mortgageRate / 12 / 100, loanTermYears * 12) - 1)
formulas.remainingMortgageBalance: loanAmount * Math.pow(1 + mortgageRate / 12 / 100, timeHorizonYears * 12) - monthlyMortgagePayment * (Math.pow(1 + mortgageRate / 12 / 100, timeHorizonYears * 12) - 1) / (mortgageRate / 12 / 100)

hiddenLossDrivers: if downPaymentPercent < 20 then 'PMI cost not included'
if timeHorizonYears < 5 then 'Transaction costs may outweigh benefits'
if appreciationRate < inflationRate then 'Real appreciation may be negative'
suggestedActions: If netBenefitOfBuying > 0: Buying is financially better over the time horizon.
If netBenefitOfBuying < 0: Renting is financially better.
Consider increasing down payment to avoid PMI.
If time horizon is short, renting may be more flexible.
Review property tax and insurance rates for accuracy.

inputs.label: Repair Time (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Actual or estimated repair duration. Based on industrial engineering time studies (Maynard) and maintenance benchmarks.

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Cost ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened labor rate including overhead. Standard cost accounting practice.

inputs.label: Parts Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of replacement parts. Procurement data.

inputs.label: Downtime Cost per Hour ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Lost revenue or production cost per hour of downtime. Based on throughput accounting.

inputs.label: Repair Mode
inputs.businessContext: Standard: normal shift; Emergency: overtime premium; Premium: expedited parts and labor. Lean/SMED classification.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment. ISO 9001 data quality.

thresholds.totalCost: if totalCost > 10000 then 'High repair cost warning'

hiddenLossDrivers: if totalCost > 10000 then 'High repair cost warning'
suggestedActions: if repairTimeHours > 8 then 'Consider SMED techniques to reduce repair time'
if partsCost > 500 then 'Evaluate alternative suppliers or rebuild options'
if downtimeCostPerHour > 1000 then 'Implement preventive maintenance to reduce frequency'

inputs.label: Menu Item Price
inputs.businessContext: Selling price of the menu item as listed on the menu. Based on standard menu engineering principles (Kasavana & Smith).

inputs.label: Food Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct cost of ingredients for one serving. Includes raw materials, portion cost. Standard cost accounting for restaurants.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Labor cost allocated per serving (including prep, cooking, service). Based on time-driven activity-based costing (TDABC).

inputs.label: Overhead Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Allocated overhead (rent, utilities, equipment) per serving. Standard cost allocation methods.

inputs.label: Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of food prepared that is wasted (spoilage, overproduction, plate waste). Lean manufacturing waste reduction (Muda).

inputs.label: Discount Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Average discount applied to menu item (coupons, promotions, loyalty). Revenue management.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment of final margin. Based on data quality assessment (ISO 8000).

rules: foodCostPerUnit + laborCostPerUnit + overheadCostPerUnit < menuItemPrice (otherwise negative margin)

suggestedActions: wastePercentage > 10 ? 'Implement portion control and inventory management (Lean)' : ''
discountPercentage > 10 ? 'Review discount strategy and target promotions' : ''
marginLeakPercent > 5 ? 'Conduct menu engineering to optimize pricing and cost' : ''

inputs.label: İçerik Maliyeti (kg başına)
inputs.businessContext: Hammadde maliyeti, tabak maliyetinin ana bileşenidir. ISO 9001 kalite yönetimi kapsamında tedarikçi fiyatları dikkate alınır.

inputs.label: Porsiyon Ağırlığı
inputs.businessContext: Standart porsiyon büyüklüğü, menü mühendisliği prensiplerine göre belirlenir. Lean üretimde israfı önlemek için optimize edilir.

inputs.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (saat başına)
inputs.businessContext: Mutfak personelinin saatlik ücreti. Endüstri mühendisliğinde iş ölçümü ve zaman etüdü ile belirlenir.

inputs.label: Porsiyon Başına Hazırlık Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Bir porsiyonun hazırlanması için geçen süre. Maynard'ın iş etüdü prensiplerine dayanır.

inputs.label: Genel Gider Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Kira, elektrik, su gibi dolaylı maliyetlerin yüzdesi. Finansal analizde standart maliyet muhasebesi yöntemi.

inputs.label: Fire Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Üretim sırasında oluşan atık yüzdesi. Six Sigma'da israf azaltma hedefi.

inputs.label: Hedef Kar Marjı
inputs.businessContext: Restoranın hedeflediği kar oranı. Finansal oran analizinde kullanılır.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Risk yönetiminde kullanılır.

thresholds.wastePercentage > 10: Yüksek fire oranı, maliyetleri artırıyor. Süreç iyileştirme önerilir.
thresholds.desiredProfitMargin > 50: Hedef kar marjı çok yüksek, pazar koşullarını kontrol edin.
thresholds.overheadRate > 50: Genel giderler çok yüksek, maliyet düşürme aksiyonu alınmalı.

suggestedActions: Fire oranını düşürmek için süreç iyileştirme (Lean) uygulayın.
Genel giderleri azaltmak için enerji verimliliği (ISO 50001) ve tedarikçi optimizasyonu yapın.
Porsiyon ağırlığını standartlaştırarak israfı azaltın.

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (Annual)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost of goods sold. Standard financial metric per GAAP/IFRS.

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value
inputs.businessContext: Average inventory over the period. Calculated as (beginning inventory + ending inventory)/2. Per accounting standards.

inputs.label: Days in Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the analysis period. Typically 365 for annual.

inputs.label: Industry Benchmark Turnover
inputs.businessContext: Average inventory turnover ratio for the retail sector. Source: WERC/APICS benchmarks.

inputs.label: Demand Variability (Coefficient of Variation)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of variation of demand. Higher values indicate higher risk. Based on supply chain risk management literature.

inputs.label: Lead Time (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Average replenishment lead time from suppliers. Key input for safety stock calculations.

inputs.label: Service Level Target
inputs.businessContext: Desired cycle service level. Common values: 95% for standard, 97.5% for premium. Based on inventory theory.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Score
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final risk score. Common in risk assessment frameworks.

hiddenLossDrivers: if inventoryTurnoverRatio < 2 then 'Low turnover indicates overstocking or obsolescence risk'
if demandVariability > 0.5 then 'High demand variability increases safety stock and risk'
if leadTimeDays > 60 then 'Long lead time increases supply chain vulnerability'
suggestedActions: if inventoryTurnoverRatio < industryBenchmarkTurnover then 'Review slow-moving items and consider markdowns or liquidation'
if demandVariability > 0.5 then 'Implement demand forecasting improvements and safety stock optimization'
if leadTimeDays > 60 then 'Explore supplier diversification or nearshoring to reduce lead time'
General: 'Conduct ABC analysis to prioritize inventory management efforts'

premiumFeatures: Detailed Report with breakdowns and charts

inputs.label: Annual Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue from sales. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to production. Standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: SG&A, R&D, depreciation. Based on income statement.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Threshold >0.05 triggers critical warning.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework a defective unit. Lean manufacturing waste reduction.

inputs.label: Units Produced Annually
inputs.businessContext: Total production volume. Used to scale defect costs.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual holding cost as % of inventory value. APICS standard: 20-30%.

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value
inputs.businessContext: Average value of inventory held. Used for carrying cost calculation.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty.

hiddenLossDrivers: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'High defect rate causing significant rework cost' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defect rate' : ''
inventoryHoldingCostRate > 0.3 ? 'Review inventory management; consider JIT or lean practices' : ''
erosionRatio > 0.1 ? 'Conduct value stream mapping to identify waste' : ''

inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (NPV, IRR).

inputs.label: Annual Net Cash Inflow
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual incremental cash inflows minus outflows from the investment. Based on discounted cash flow analysis.

inputs.label: Project Lifetime
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the investment. Typical range 1-50 years based on asset depreciation standards (MACRS).

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of capital or required rate of return. Based on CAPM or WACC standards.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated residual value at end of project lifetime. Based on asset depreciation methods.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs such as maintenance, labor, energy. Based on life cycle costing (ISO 15686).

inputs.label: Annual Revenue Increase
inputs.businessContext: Expected additional revenue from the investment. Based on market analysis and forecasting.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk-adjusted ROI. Based on sensitivity analysis standards.

rules: If dataConfidence is 'low', discountRate must be increased by 2% (handled in formulas)

breakdown.totalCashInflows: Total Present Value of Cash Inflows

hiddenLossDrivers: If roiPercent < 0: 'Negative ROI indicates investment destroys value'
If paybackPeriod > projectLifetime: 'Payback period exceeds project lifetime'
suggestedActions: If roiPercent < 0: 'Consider reducing initial investment or increasing revenue projections'
If paybackPeriod > projectLifetime: 'Negotiate longer project lifetime or improve cash flows'
If dataConfidence is low: 'Perform sensitivity analysis and gather more accurate data'

inputs.label: Roof Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the roof along the ridge. Based on standard architectural measurements.

inputs.label: Roof Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the roof from eave to eave. Standard dimension for rectangular roofs.

inputs.label: Roof Pitch (rise/run)
inputs.businessContext: Slope of the roof expressed as rise over run. Common values: 0.5 (6/12), 1.0 (12/12).

inputs.label: Eave Overhang
inputs.businessContext: Extra length extending beyond the walls for water runoff. Typical 0.3-0.6 m.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material waste due to cutting and overlap. Industry standard 5-15%.

inputs.label: Roof Type
inputs.businessContext: Architectural style affecting area calculation. Gable: simple triangle ends; Hip: slopes on all sides.

rules: if roofType == 'flat' then roofPitch must be <= 0.25

thresholds.wasteFactor > 15: High waste factor may indicate inefficiency; consider optimizing cuts.
thresholds.roofPitch > 1.0: Steep roof; safety precautions required for installation.

hiddenLossDrivers: wasteFactor > 15 ? 'Excessive waste factor increases material cost' : ''
roofPitch > 1.0 ? 'Steep pitch may require additional labor and safety measures' : ''
suggestedActions: If wasteFactor > 15: Review cutting patterns and consider prefabricated panels.
If roofPitch > 1.0: Use safety harnesses and plan for longer installation time.
If roofType == 'hip': Account for additional material due to hip cuts.

inputs.label: Contract Value
inputs.businessContext: Total contract amount agreed with client. Based on standard construction contract practices.

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of roofing materials (shingles, underlayment, etc.). Referenced from RSMeans construction cost data.

inputs.label: Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost for installation. Based on prevailing wage rates and crew size.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 10-20% for roofing contractors.

inputs.label: Contingency Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Buffer for unforeseen costs. Industry standard 5-15%.

inputs.label: Target Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin. Typical target 15-25% for roofing contracts.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in cost estimates. Low = rough estimate, High = detailed takeoff.

inputs.label: Roof Area
inputs.businessContext: Total roof surface area. Used for unit cost calculations.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Roof complexity (pitch, penetrations, etc.). Low = simple gable, High = multiple hips/valleys.

thresholds.marginPercent < 10: Warning: Margin below 10% - high risk of loss
thresholds.contingencyPercent > 20: Warning: High contingency indicates poor cost estimation

hiddenLossDrivers: if marginPercent < marginTarget then 'Margin below target'
suggestedActions: if marginPercent < marginTarget then 'Review material and labor costs for savings opportunities'
if contingencyPercent > 20 then 'Improve cost estimation accuracy'
if complexityFactor == 'high' then 'Consider value engineering to reduce complexity'

inputs.label: Roof Area
inputs.businessContext: Total roof area to be covered. Standard measure in roofing industry (ASTM D6630).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Square
inputs.businessContext: Cost of roofing material per square (100 sq ft). Industry standard unit (NRCA).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for roofing labor. Based on prevailing wage rates (BLS).

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Square
inputs.businessContext: Estimated labor hours required per square. Industry benchmarks (RSMeans).

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material waste due to cutting, overlap, etc. Typical range 5-15% (ASTM D6630).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Overhead as percentage of direct costs (labor + material). Standard construction accounting (AIA).

inputs.label: Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on total cost. Typical 15-25% (NRCA).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts final cost for uncertainty (risk management).

thresholds.wasteFactor > 15: High waste factor may indicate inefficiency or poor material quality.
thresholds.laborHoursPerSquare > 3: Labor hours per square exceed typical benchmark (RSMeans).
thresholds.materialCostPerSquare > 200: Material cost per square is above average; consider alternative materials.

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 15 ? 'Review material handling and cutting processes to reduce waste.' : ''
laborHoursPerSquare > 3 ? 'Evaluate crew efficiency and consider training or process improvement.' : ''
materialCostPerSquare > 200 ? 'Explore alternative materials or negotiate bulk pricing.' : ''

inputs.label: Project Duration (days)
inputs.businessContext: Total planned duration of the roofing project. Based on project scheduling standards (PMI PMBOK).

inputs.label: Historical Weather Delay Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of days historically lost due to weather in the region. Derived from local climate data or industry benchmarks (e.g., NRCA guidelines).

inputs.label: Seasonal Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts delay probability based on season. 'high' for rainy/snowy months, 'low' for dry season. Based on meteorological risk assessment.

inputs.label: Critical Path Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of project duration that is on the critical path and weather-sensitive. From project schedule analysis (CPM).

inputs.label: Daily Cost Rate ($/day)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per day of delay including labor, equipment, and overhead. Based on contractor's cost data.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data quality. Affects adjustment of final risk estimate. Based on data governance standards.

suggestedActions: if expectedDelayDays > projectDurationDays * 0.2 then 'Consider adding weather contingency buffer to schedule'
if expectedCostImpact > 100000 then 'Evaluate alternative roofing methods or materials to reduce weather sensitivity'
if historicalWeatherDelayRate > 0.3 then 'Review historical data accuracy and consider using more conservative estimates'

inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total route distance in kilometers. Standard unit for transportation distance.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption (L/km)
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption per kilometer. Based on vehicle specifications or historical data.

inputs.label: Fuel Price ($/L)
inputs.businessContext: Current fuel price per liter. Market rate.

inputs.label: Driver Hourly Rate ($/h)
inputs.businessContext: Driver wage per hour. Includes benefits and overhead.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average speed including traffic and stops.

inputs.label: Toll Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Total toll fees for the route.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost ($/km)
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle maintenance cost per kilometer. Based on fleet data.

inputs.label: Load Weight (tons)
inputs.businessContext: Total cargo weight in tons. Affects fuel consumption and wear.

inputs.label: Cost per Ton-km ($/ton-km)
inputs.businessContext: Benchmark cost per ton-kilometer for comparison.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for cost reporting.

hiddenLossDrivers: if costEfficiencyRatio > 1.2 then 'Cost efficiency ratio exceeds 1.2, indicating higher than benchmark cost per ton-km.'
if fuelCost / totalCost > 0.4 then 'Fuel cost proportion exceeds 40%, consider fuel efficiency improvements.'
suggestedActions: Optimize route to reduce distance or avoid tolls.
Improve fuel efficiency through driver training or vehicle maintenance.
Increase load factor to reduce cost per ton-km.
Negotiate lower fuel prices or use alternative fuels.

inputs.label: Total Route Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance of the delivery route. Based on standard logistics metrics (WERC, APICS).

inputs.label: Number of Stops
inputs.businessContext: Number of delivery points. Common in route optimization (TSP, VRP).

inputs.label: Vehicle Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Maximum load capacity of the vehicle. ISO 9001 quality standards for transport.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of vehicle capacity utilized. Lean logistics KPI.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fuel consumption per 100 km. ISO 50001 energy management.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current fuel price. Financial input for cost analysis.

inputs.label: Driver Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Driver wage per hour. Labor cost standard.

inputs.label: Average Speed
inputs.businessContext: Average vehicle speed including traffic. Transportation engineering.

inputs.label: Time per Stop
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent at each stop for loading/unloading. Lean process time.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle maintenance cost per kilometer. Total cost of ownership.

inputs.label: Toll Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total toll fees for the route. Route cost component.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data quality. Used for risk-adjusted outputs.

thresholds.loadFactor < 50: Low vehicle utilization; consider consolidating routes.
thresholds.fuelConsumptionRate > 40: High fuel consumption; check vehicle maintenance.
thresholds.averageSpeed < 30: Low average speed; possible traffic congestion.
thresholds.timePerStop > 30: Excessive stop time; review loading processes.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 70: Low data confidence; results may be unreliable.

suggestedActions: If loadFactor < 50: Consolidate shipments to increase utilization.
If fuelConsumptionRate > 40: Perform vehicle maintenance and check tire pressure.
If averageSpeed < 30: Re-route to avoid congestion or adjust delivery windows.
If timePerStop > 30: Implement lean loading/unloading procedures.
If dataConfidence < 70: Verify input data sources and improve data collection.

inputs.label: Dinamik Yük (C)
inputs.businessContext: Rulmanın dinamik yük kapasitesi (C), ISO 281 standardına göre tanımlanır. Rulmanın nominal ömrünü hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Eşdeğer Yük (P)
inputs.businessContext: Rulmana etki eden eşdeğer dinamik yük (P). ISO 281'e göre radyal ve eksenel yüklerin birleşiminden hesaplanır.

inputs.label: Ömür Üssü (p)
inputs.businessContext: Rulman tipine bağlı üs: bilyalı rulmanlar için p=3, makaralı rulmanlar için p=10/3. ISO 281 standardı.

inputs.label: Güvenilirlik Faktörü (a1)
inputs.businessContext: Güvenilirlik faktörü (a1), ISO 281'e göre %90 güvenilirlik için 1, daha yüksek güvenilirlikler için daha düşük değerler alır.

inputs.label: Günlük Çalışma Saati
inputs.businessContext: Rulmanın günlük ortalama çalışma saati. Ömür hesaplamasında zaman birimini dönüştürmek için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Yıllık Çalışma Günü
inputs.businessContext: Rulmanın yıllık çalışma günü sayısı. Yıllık ömür hesaplaması için kullanılır.

thresholds.L10h < 1000: Kritik: Rulman ömrü çok düşük, yeniden boyutlandırma gerekebilir.
thresholds.L10h < 5000: Uyarı: Rulman ömrü sınırda, bakım planı gözden geçirilmeli.
thresholds.equivalentLoad/dynamicLoad > 0.5: Uyarı: Yük oranı yüksek, rulman aşırı yüklenmiş olabilir.

suggestedActions: Daha yüksek dinamik yük kapasiteli rulman seçin
Eşdeğer yükü azaltmak için yük dağılımını iyileştirin
Güvenilirlik gereksinimini düşürün veya daha sık bakım planlayın

inputs.label: Anma Gücü
inputs.businessContext: Türbinin nominal gücü (kW). Üretici teknik verilerinden alınır. IEC 61400-1 standardına dayanır.

inputs.label: Göbek Yüksekliği
inputs.businessContext: Türbin göbeğinin yerden yüksekliği. Rüzgar hızı profilini etkiler. IEC 61400-1 standardı.

inputs.label: Rotor Çapı
inputs.businessContext: Rotor kanatlarının çapı. Süpürme alanını belirler. IEC 61400-1 standardı.

inputs.label: Ortalama Rüzgar Hızı
inputs.businessContext: Türbin sahasındaki yıllık ortalama rüzgar hızı. Meteorolojik verilerden alınır. Weibull dağılımı kullanılır.

inputs.label: Hava Yoğunluğu
inputs.businessContext: Standart deniz seviyesi hava yoğunluğu 1.225 kg/m³. Sıcaklık ve rakıma göre değişir. IEC 61400-12-1.

inputs.label: Kapasite Faktörü
inputs.businessContext: Gerçek üretimin teorik maksimuma oranı. Saha koşullarına bağlıdır. Genellikle %20-40 arası.

inputs.label: Kullanılabilirlik
inputs.businessContext: Türbinin çalışır durumda olduğu zaman oranı. Bakım ve arızalardan etkilenir. Endüstri standardı >%95.

inputs.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
inputs.businessContext: Bir yıldaki toplam saat (8760). Artık yıl için 8784 kullanılabilir.

rules: rotorDiameter must be less than or equal to 2 * hubHeight (structural constraint)
averageWindSpeed must be between cut-in and cut-out speeds (typically 3-25 m/s)

thresholds.capacityFactor: if capacityFactor < 20 then 'Düşük kapasite faktörü: saha verimsiz olabilir'
thresholds.availability: if availability < 90 then 'Kritik: kullanılabilirlik düşük, bakım planını gözden geçirin'

suggestedActions: Kapasite faktörünü artırmak için daha yüksek rüzgar hızlı saha seçin
Kullanılabilirliği artırmak için önleyici bakım programı uygulayın
Rotor çapını veya göbek yüksekliğini optimize edin

inputs.label: Annual Salary (Gross)
inputs.businessContext: Base annual gross salary per employee. Standard HR metric.

inputs.label: Bonus Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Annual bonus as percentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

inputs.label: Employer Tax Rate (Social Security, etc.)
inputs.businessContext: Employer-paid taxes (e.g., Social Security, Medicare in US). Varies by country.

inputs.label: Benefits Cost per Employee per Year
inputs.businessContext: Health insurance, retirement contributions, etc. Industry benchmark: ~30% of salary.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (Facilities, IT, etc.)
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs allocated per employee. Common in cost accounting.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Standard working days (excluding weekends and holidays). Typical: 260.

inputs.label: Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Standard working hours per day. Typical: 8.

inputs.label: Productive Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of paid time spent on productive work. Lean metric; typical 70-85%.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for cost display. ISO 4217.

thresholds.productiveUtilization < 60: Low utilization warning: consider process improvement.
thresholds.employerTaxRate > 30: High tax burden: review tax optimization strategies.
thresholds.overheadRate > 50: High overhead: investigate cost reduction opportunities.

hiddenLossDrivers: productiveUtilization < 60 ? 'Low utilization increases effective hourly cost' : ''
suggestedActions: If productiveUtilization < 70: Implement Lean techniques (e.g., 5S, Kaizen) to improve utilization.
If employerTaxRate > 30: Consult tax advisor for legal optimization.
If overheadRate > 40: Review indirect costs and consider shared services.

inputs.label: Population Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items or individuals in the population. Required for finite population correction. Based on statistical sampling standards (ISO 2859, ANSI/ASQ Z1.4).

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Desired probability that the sample accurately represents the population. Common choices: 90%, 95%, 99%. Based on Six Sigma and hypothesis testing standards.

inputs.label: Margin of Error
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceptable difference between sample statistic and population parameter. Typically 5% for general surveys. Based on survey methodology (Cochran, 1977).

inputs.label: Expected Proportion
inputs.businessContext: Anticipated proportion of the population with the attribute of interest. Use 50% for maximum variability. Based on sample size formulas (Cochran, 1977).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in the input data quality (e.g., from historical data). Adjusts final sample size upward if data confidence is low. Based on risk management practices.

rules: If populationSize < 30, warn: 'Small population size may require census.'

thresholds.marginOfError > 10: WARNING: Margin of error >10% may yield unreliable results.
thresholds.expectedProportion < 10 or expectedPropo: WARNING: Extreme proportion may require larger sample size.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 80: WARNING: Low data confidence; consider increasing sample size.

hiddenLossDrivers: marginOfError > 10 ? 'High margin of error reduces precision' : null
dataConfidence < 80 ? 'Low data confidence inflates sample size' : null
suggestedActions: If marginOfError > 10, consider reducing margin of error to improve precision.
If expectedProportion is extreme, verify the estimate or use 50% for conservative sample size.
If dataConfidence < 80, improve data collection methods or increase sample size accordingly.

premiumFeatures: Comparison of sample sizes for different scenarios
Detailed report with confidence intervals and power analysis

inputs.label: Satış Kanalı Adı
inputs.businessContext: Karşılaştırma yapılacak satış kanalının seçimi. Endüstri standardı olarak kanal bazlı karlılık analizi yaygındır.

inputs.label: Toplam Gelir
inputs.businessContext: Kanal üzerinden elde edilen toplam satış geliri. Finansal tablolardan alınır.

inputs.label: Satılan Malın Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Ürünlerin maliyeti; hammadde, işçilik ve genel üretim giderlerini içerir. Muhasebe standardı.

inputs.label: Pazarlama Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Kanal için yapılan reklam, promosyon ve dijital pazarlama harcamaları.

inputs.label: Satış Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Satış ekibi maaşları, komisyonlar ve satışla ilgili diğer giderler.

inputs.label: Lojistik Maliyeti
inputs.businessContext: Nakliye, depolama ve dağıtım maliyetleri. Tedarik zinciri yönetimi standardı.

inputs.label: Genel Gider
inputs.businessContext: Kanal için tahsis edilen genel yönetim giderleri (kira, elektrik, vb.).

inputs.label: İade Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Satılan ürünlerin iade yüzdesi. İade maliyetleri karlılığı etkiler.

inputs.label: İskonto Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Kanalda uygulanan ortalama iskonto oranı. Net geliri düşürür.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni
inputs.businessContext: Verilerin güvenilirlik yüzdesi. Düşükse sonuçlar düzeltilir.

formulas.totalCost: costOfGoodsSold + marketingCost + salesCost + logisticsCost + overheadCost + returnCost

suggestedActions: netProfitMargin < 5 ? 'Maliyetleri düşürmek için süreç iyileştirme yapın' : ''
returnRate > 10 ? 'Ürün kalitesini artırın veya iade politikasını gözden geçirin' : ''
discountRate > 30 ? 'Fiyatlandırma stratejisini optimize edin' : ''

inputs.label: Current Savings
inputs.businessContext: Initial amount already saved. Standard financial planning input.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount saved each month. Common in personal finance and retirement planning.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual return on savings. Based on historical market averages (e.g., S&P 500 ~7-10% nominal).

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: Time horizon for savings goal. Standard input for time value of money calculations.

inputs.label: Goal Amount
inputs.businessContext: Target savings amount. User-defined financial objective.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often interest is compounded. Affects future value; monthly is common for savings accounts.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation. Adjusts goal to real terms; typical central bank target ~2%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input estimates. Adjusts output for risk; low confidence applies a discount.

thresholds.annualInterestRate > 20: Warning: Unrealistically high interest rate; verify input.
thresholds.inflationRate > 10: Warning: High inflation; consider adjusting goal.
thresholds.goalAmount / (currentSavings + monthlyCo: Warning: Goal may be unrealistic given inputs.

formulas.futureValue: currentSavings * (1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years) + monthlyContribution * ((1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years) - 1) / (effectiveAnnualRate / n)
formulas.requiredMonthlyContribution: if goalMet then 0 else (goalAmount - currentSavings * (1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years)) * (effectiveAnnualRate / n) / ((1 + effectiveAnnualRate / n)^(n * years) - 1)

hiddenLossDrivers: if inflationRate > 5 then 'Inflation erodes purchasing power'
if annualInterestRate < 3 then 'Low interest rate may not beat inflation'
if monthlyContribution == 0 and currentSavings == 0 then 'No savings input'
suggestedActions: if not goalMet then 'Increase monthly contribution to ' + requiredMonthlyContribution.toFixed(2)
if annualInterestRate < 5 then 'Consider higher-yield investments'
if inflationRate > 3 then 'Adjust goal for inflation'

inputs.label: Total Production Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the period. Based on production records (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Scrap Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of units scrapped due to defects or waste. Direct measure from quality control (Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Rework Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Units that required rework but not scrapped. Important for total waste analysis (Lean).

inputs.label: Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to produce one unit including materials, labor, overhead. Used for financial impact (Managerial Accounting).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost to rework one unit. Typically lower than original cost but significant (Lean Accounting).

inputs.label: Period Days
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the analysis period. Used for rate normalization (standard reporting).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs (risk management).

suggestedActions: scrapRate > 0.05 ? 'Investigate root causes of scrap: implement poka-yoke or process control.' : ''
reworkRate > 0.05 ? 'Analyze rework drivers: consider training or standard work.' : ''
totalWasteCost > 10000 ? 'Conduct cost-benefit analysis for process improvement.' : ''

inputs.label: Total Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue for the period. Based on standard financial reporting (GAAP/IFRS).

inputs.label: Cost of Goods Sold
inputs.businessContext: Direct costs attributable to production. Includes materials, labor, overhead. ISO 9001 cost accounting guidelines.

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: SG&A, R&D, depreciation, etc. Excludes interest and taxes. Standard income statement classification.

inputs.label: Other Income
inputs.businessContext: Non-operating income (e.g., interest, gains). Included for comprehensive margin calculation.

inputs.label: Other Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Non-operating expenses (e.g., interest, losses).

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Effective corporate tax rate. Based on jurisdiction and tax laws.

inputs.label: Period Length (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Number of days in the reporting period. Used for annualization if needed.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted outputs. Based on data quality assessment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

hiddenLossDrivers: if grossMargin < 0.2 then 'Low gross margin indicates high COGS or low pricing power'
if operatingMargin < 0.05 then 'Operating expenses are too high relative to revenue'
if netMargin < 0.02 then 'Net margin critically low; risk of loss'
suggestedActions: if grossMargin < 0.2 then 'Review supplier contracts and production efficiency (Lean)'
if operatingMargin < 0.05 then 'Implement cost reduction programs (Six Sigma)'
if netMargin < 0.02 then 'Consider restructuring or strategic pivot'
outputs.dataConfidenceAdjusted: netMargin * (1 - (1 - confidenceFactor)) where confidenceFactor = {low:0.8, medium:0.9, high:1.0}

inputs.label: Target Plant Population (plants/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Desired number of plants per hectare at harvest. Based on agronomic recommendations for specific crop and region.

inputs.label: Germination Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate. Determined by seed lot testing (ISTA standards).

inputs.label: Seedling Survival Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of germinated seeds that survive to establish. Accounts for field conditions, pests, etc.

inputs.label: Thousand Seed Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of 1000 seeds in grams. Varies by crop variety; used to convert seed count to weight.

inputs.label: Row Spacing (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between rows. Affects plant density and seed rate calculation.

inputs.label: Seed Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of seed per kilogram. Used for economic analysis.

inputs.label: Field Area (ha)
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be planted. Used to calculate total seed required and cost.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (%)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts final recommendation for risk.

thresholds.germinationRate < 80: Low germination rate may require higher seed rate or seed treatment.
thresholds.seedlingSurvivalRate < 75: Low survival rate indicates poor field conditions; consider increasing seed rate.
thresholds.seedCostPerKg > 20: High seed cost; consider precision planting to reduce waste.

suggestedActions: germinationRate < 80 ? 'Consider seed priming or treatment to improve germination.' : ''
seedlingSurvivalRate < 75 ? 'Improve field preparation and pest control.' : ''
seedCostPerKg > 20 ? 'Use precision seeding to reduce seed waste.' : ''

inputs.label: Kaynak Ses Seviyesi (dB)
inputs.businessContext: Gürültü kaynağının ses basınç seviyesi. ISO 3740 serisi standartlarına göre ölçülür.

inputs.label: Yalıtım Malzemesi Türü
inputs.businessContext: Farklı malzemelerin ses yalıtım katsayıları (STC) ASTM E413 standardına göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: Malzeme Kalınlığı (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Yalıtım malzemesinin kalınlığı, ses iletim kaybını doğrudan etkiler. ISO 717-1 standardı referans alınır.

inputs.label: Duvar Tipi
inputs.businessContext: Duvar yapısı, ses yalıtım performansını belirler. ASTM E90 test yöntemi kullanılır.

inputs.label: Ortam Sıcaklığı (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Sıcaklık, malzeme yoğunluğunu ve ses hızını etkiler. ISO 9613-2 standardı referans alınır.

inputs.label: Veri Güveni (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük değerler sonucu daha muhafazakar yapar.

thresholds.kaynakSesSeviyesi > 120: Yüksek gürültü seviyesi, işitme koruma önlemleri gerekli.
thresholds.malzemeKalınlık < 25: Yalıtım kalınlığı çok düşük, etkinlik azalabilir.
thresholds.dataConfidence < 0.5: Veri güveni düşük, sonuçlar dikkatle yorumlanmalı.

suggestedActions: sonucSesSeviyesi > 85 ? 'İşitme koruyucu ekipman kullanın.' : ''
malzemeKalınlık < 50 ? 'Daha kalın yalıtım malzemesi tercih edin.' : ''
dataConfidence < 0.7 ? 'Veri kaynaklarını doğrulayın.' : ''

inputs.label: Brüt Ücret (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Çalışanın brüt maaşı. SGK prim hesaplamalarında esas alınan tutar. 5510 sayılı Sosyal Sigortalar ve Genel Sağlık Sigortası Kanunu'na göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: İşçi SGK Primi Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: İşçi payı SGK primi oranı. 5510 sayılı Kanun'un 81. maddesi uyarınca %14 olarak belirlenmiştir. İşveren tarafından kesilir.

inputs.label: İşveren SGK Primi Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: İşveren payı SGK primi oranı. 5510 sayılı Kanun'un 81. maddesi uyarınca %20.5 olarak belirlenmiştir. İşveren tarafından ödenir.

inputs.label: İşveren İşsizlik Sigortası Primi Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: İşveren payı işsizlik sigortası primi oranı. 4447 sayılı Kanun uyarınca %2'dir.

inputs.label: İşçi İşsizlik Sigortası Primi Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: İşçi payı işsizlik sigortası primi oranı. 4447 sayılı Kanun uyarınca %1'dir.

inputs.label: Asgari Ücret (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Yürürlükteki brüt asgari ücret tutarı. SGK tavan ve taban hesaplamalarında kullanılır. 2024 yılı için 17.002 TL.

inputs.label: SGK Tavan Katsayısı
inputs.businessContext: SGK primine esas kazanç tavanı, asgari ücretin bu katsayı ile çarpımıyla bulunur. 5510 sayılı Kanun'a göre 7.5'tir.

thresholds.brutUcret > asgariUcret * sgkTavanKatSay: Brüt ücret SGK tavanını aşıyor, prim tavan üzerinden hesaplanacak.
thresholds.brutUcret < asgariUcret: Brüt ücret asgari ücretin altında, prim asgari ücret üzerinden hesaplanacak.

formulas.primMatrah: brutUcret < sgkTaban ? sgkTaban : (brutUcret > sgkTavan ? sgkTavan : brutUcret)

hiddenLossDrivers: brutUcret > asgariUcret * sgkTavanKatSayi ? 'Brüt ücret tavanı aştığı için prim matrahı tavana çekildi.' : ''
brutUcret < asgariUcret ? 'Brüt ücret asgari ücretin altında olduğu için prim matrahı asgari ücrete yükseltildi.' : ''
suggestedActions: Brüt ücreti asgari ücretin altında belirlemekten kaçının.
SGK tavanını aşan ücretlerde ek fayda planlaması yapın.
İşveren prim oranlarını düzenli olarak kontrol edin.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Based on current market prices for sheet metal (e.g., steel, aluminum). Refer to ISO 9001 for material traceability.

inputs.label: Material Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Standard sheet metal gauges; affects bending force and scrap rate. ASTM A568/A568M for steel sheet.

inputs.label: Part Area
inputs.businessContext: Surface area of the flat pattern; used to calculate material usage and nesting efficiency.

inputs.label: Annual Volume
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly production quantity; influences tooling amortization and setup cost per part.

inputs.label: Setup Time per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Time to change dies and program CNC; SMED principles (Shigeo Shingo) for quick changeover.

inputs.label: Cycle Time per Part
inputs.businessContext: Time from start to finish for one part; includes punching, bending, and handling. Lean manufacturing standard.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average wage including overhead; based on industry benchmarks (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

inputs.label: Machine Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Includes depreciation, maintenance, energy; ISO 50001 for energy cost allocation.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted; Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defects. Typical range 1-5% for sheet metal.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of non-conforming parts; ISO 9001 quality management. Threshold >5% triggers critical warning.

inputs.label: Tooling Cost
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for dies and fixtures; amortized over annual volume. CAPEX evaluation.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs for indirect expenses (rent, utilities, admin). Activity-based costing.

inputs.label: Profit Margin Target
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin; used to calculate target price. Financial ratio analysis.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy; affects risk adjustment. Common in risk management frameworks.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Different materials have different costs, densities, and formability. ASTM material standards.

rules: if dataConfidence == 'low' then apply risk factor 1.2

hiddenLossDrivers: scrapRate > 10 ? 'High scrap rate increases material waste' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement SPC and root cause analysis to reduce defects' : ''
scrapRate > 10 ? 'Optimize nesting and consider better material utilization' : ''
setupTimeHours > 4 ? 'Apply SMED techniques to reduce setup time' : ''
profitMarginTarget < 10 ? 'Review cost structure or increase target margin' : ''

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of sheet metal. Source: industry benchmark (e.g., MEPS).

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted. Typical range 10-30% for sheet metal. Source: Lean manufacturing standards.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced per year. Used to scale scrap cost.

inputs.label: Part Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of each finished part. Source: engineering BOM.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including overhead. Source: industry labor surveys.

inputs.label: Cycle Time per Part
inputs.businessContext: Time to produce one part. Source: time studies.

inputs.label: Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of scrap material. Source: waste management contracts.

inputs.label: Rework Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of parts requiring rework. Source: quality records.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Part
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to rework a defective part. Source: cost accounting.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment. Source: data governance policy.

thresholds.scrapRate > 20: High scrap rate warning: consider process improvement.
thresholds.reworkRate > 10: High rework rate warning: investigate root causes.
thresholds.materialCostPerKg > 5: Material cost above typical range; review supplier pricing.

suggestedActions: Implement nesting optimization to reduce scrap.
Review stamping process parameters to lower scrap rate.
Consider preventive maintenance to reduce rework.
Negotiate better material pricing or alternative suppliers.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Material density varies; standard densities from ASM Handbook.

inputs.label: Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Sheet thickness; typical range 0.1-100 mm per ISO 3574.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Sheet width; standard widths up to 5000 mm.

inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Sheet length; standard lengths up to 12000 mm.

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical sheets.

inputs.label: Unit System
inputs.businessContext: Select measurement system; metric (mm, kg) or imperial (in, lb).

rules: if unitSystem == 'imperial' then thickness, width, length must be in inches

thresholds.thickness: if thickness < 0.5 then 'Thin sheet; handle with care'
thresholds.width: if width > 3000 then 'Oversized; special handling required'

formulas.density: case materialType when 'steel' then 7850 when 'aluminum' then 2700 when 'copper' then 8960 when 'stainless_steel' then 8000 when 'brass' then 8500 else 7850 end
formulas.weightPerSheetImperial: if unitSystem == 'imperial' then (thickness * width * length) * 0.2836 else null
formulas.totalWeightImperial: if unitSystem == 'imperial' then weightPerSheetImperial * quantity else null

hiddenLossDrivers: if thickness < 0.5 then 'Thin sheet; handle with care'
if width > 3000 then 'Oversized; special handling required'
suggestedActions: Verify material density with supplier
Consider nesting to reduce waste

inputs.label: Direct Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including benefits and payroll taxes. Based on industry standards (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to overhead (facilities, utilities, indirect labor). Typical range 100-200% in manufacturing.

inputs.label: Machine Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation, maintenance, and energy cost per machine hour. Based on equipment lifecycle costing.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit produced. Includes raw materials and purchased components.

inputs.label: Production Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced per hour. Based on standard time studies (Maynard).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units. Six Sigma target < 0.34% (3.4 DPMO).

inputs.label: Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of available time that equipment or labor is productive. World-class manufacturing target > 85% (OEE).

inputs.label: Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on shop rate. Industry average 15-25%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Affects risk adjustment in final rate.

thresholds.defectRate > 5: High defect rate; consider process improvement (Six Sigma).
thresholds.overheadRate > 200: Overhead rate exceeds typical range; review indirect costs.

hiddenLossDrivers: defectRate > 5 ? 'High defect rate increases cost per good unit' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement SPC and root cause analysis to reduce defects' : ''
utilizationRate < 70 ? 'Conduct OEE analysis to improve equipment effectiveness' : ''
overheadRate > 200 ? 'Review overhead allocation and reduce non-value-added activities' : ''

inputs.label: Monthly Income
inputs.businessContext: User's total monthly income after tax. Based on personal finance standards (e.g., 50/30/20 rule).

inputs.label: Fixed Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Monthly fixed costs like rent, utilities, insurance. Essential for budget allocation.

inputs.label: Savings Goal
inputs.businessContext: Target monthly savings amount. Based on financial planning best practices.

inputs.label: Shopping Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often user shops. Affects budget period alignment.

inputs.label: Discretionary Spending Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of income after fixed expenses and savings allocated to discretionary spending. Based on 50/30/20 rule.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output.

thresholds.discretionaryPercentage > 50: High discretionary spending may hinder savings goals.
thresholds.savingsGoal > 0.3 * monthlyIncome: Savings goal is aggressive; consider adjusting.
thresholds.fixedExpenses > 0.5 * monthlyIncome: Fixed expenses exceed 50% of income; financial stress risk.

suggestedActions: If discretionary percentage > 50%, consider reducing to 30% to align with 50/30/20 rule.
If savings goal > 30% of income, review if sustainable.
If fixed expenses > 50% of income, look for ways to reduce fixed costs.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per signage unit. Based on standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly labor cost including wages and overhead. Industry standard from Maynard's Industrial Engineering Handbook.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Standard labor time per unit. Based on time studies (Lean/Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct costs allocated to overhead. Typical range 10-30% (WERC benchmarks).

inputs.label: Desired Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Target profit margin on total cost. Standard financial ratio (CAPM).

inputs.label: Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Number of signage units in the bid. Volume affects economies of scale.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts labor and material for design complexity. Based on ASTM E1699-14 standard for signage.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment (Six Sigma DMAIC).

thresholds.overheadRate > 30: Overhead rate exceeds typical benchmark (WERC). Consider cost reduction.
thresholds.profitMargin < 10: Profit margin too low for sustainable business.
thresholds.laborHoursPerUnit > 5: Labor hours per unit high; investigate process improvement (Lean).

suggestedActions: if overheadRate > 30 then 'Review overhead allocation and reduce non-value-added activities'
if profitMargin < 10 then 'Increase profit margin or reduce costs'
if laborHoursPerUnit > 5 then 'Implement Lean techniques to reduce labor time'

inputs.label: Silindir Çapı (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Silindirin iç çapı. ISO 2768-1 standardına göre toleranslar dikkate alınır.

inputs.label: Strok Uzunluğu (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Pistonun alt ölü nokta ile üst ölü nokta arasındaki mesafe. ISO 2768-1 standardına göre toleranslar dikkate alınır.

inputs.label: Silindir Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Motor veya sistemdeki toplam silindir sayısı. Genellikle 1-16 arası.

thresholds.cap: cap > 500 ? 'Büyük çaplı silindir, özel işleme gerekebilir.' : ''

hiddenLossDrivers: cap > 500 ? 'Büyük çaplı silindir, özel işleme gerekebilir.' : ''
suggestedActions: cap > 500 ? 'Çapı düşürmeyi veya özel işleme planlamayı değerlendirin.' : ''
stroke > 500 ? 'Strok/çap oranını optimize edin.' : ''

inputs.label: Aylık Baz Ücret (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Operatör tarafından belirlenen sabit aylık ücret. Sektör standardı: Türk Telekom, Vodafone, Turkcell tarifeleri.

inputs.label: Aylık Konuşma Süresi (dakika)
inputs.businessContext: Şirket içi ve dışı tüm görüşmelerin toplamı. Ortalama çalışan başına 500 dk/ay (benchmark).

inputs.label: Dakika Başına Konuşma Ücreti (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Operatörün belirlediği ücret. Genellikle 0.20-0.30 TL/dk arası.

inputs.label: Aylık Veri Kullanımı (GB)
inputs.businessContext: İnternet kullanımı. Ortalama 10 GB/ay (benchmark).

inputs.label: GB Başına Veri Ücreti (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Operatörün belirlediği ücret. Genellikle 8-15 TL/GB.

inputs.label: Aylık SMS Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Gönderilen SMS adedi. Ortalama 100 SMS/ay.

inputs.label: SMS Başına Ücret (TL)
inputs.businessContext: Operatörün belirlediği ücret. Genellikle 0.30-0.70 TL/SMS.

inputs.label: Çalışan Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Faturaya dahil olan çalışan sayısı.

inputs.label: Kurumsal İndirim Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: Operatörle yapılan sözleşme kapsamında uygulanan indirim.

inputs.label: Vergi Oranı (%)
inputs.businessContext: KDV ve ÖİV dahil toplam vergi oranı. Türkiye'de %18 KDV + %7.5 ÖİV (toplam ~%25).

suggestedActions: totalCostPerEmployee > 200 ? 'Pazarlıkla indirim oranını artırın veya operatör değiştirin.' : null
dataUsageGB > 50 ? 'Veri kullanımını optimize edin, Wi-Fi kullanımını teşvik edin.' : null
voiceMinutes > 2000 ? 'Ses kullanımını azaltmak için VoIP çözümleri değerlendirin.' : null

inputs.label: Annual Demand (units)
inputs.businessContext: Annual demand for the product. Used to calculate economic order quantity and setup cost per unit. Based on EOQ model (Harris, 1913) and lean manufacturing principles.

inputs.label: Setup Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time required to change over from one product to another. Key metric in SMED (Shingo, 1985) to reduce waste and improve flexibility.

inputs.label: Hourly Cost of Setup Labor ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Labor cost per hour for setup activities. Includes wages, benefits, and overhead. Used to calculate setup cost per setup.

inputs.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year ($)
inputs.businessContext: Cost to hold one unit of inventory for one year. Includes storage, insurance, obsolescence, and opportunity cost. Based on inventory carrying cost standards (APICS).

inputs.label: Production Rate (units per hour)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced per hour during production. Used to calculate production time and economic production quantity (EPQ) model.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of working days per year. Used to convert annual demand to daily demand. Typical value 250 (5 days/week, 50 weeks).

inputs.label: Hours per Shift
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours in a shift. Used to calculate available production time per day.

inputs.label: Shifts per Day
inputs.businessContext: Number of shifts per day. Affects available production time.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used to adjust output for uncertainty. 1 = high confidence, 0 = low confidence.

thresholds.setupTime: If setupTime > 60, warning: 'High setup time; consider SMED improvements.'
thresholds.holdingCostPerUnit: If holdingCostPerUnit > 10, warning: 'High holding cost; review inventory policy.'
thresholds.hourlyCost: If hourlyCost > 100, warning: 'High labor cost; consider automation.'

hiddenLossDrivers: setupTime > 60 ? 'Excessive setup time increases cost and reduces flexibility.' : ''
holdingCostPerUnit > 10 ? 'High holding cost may indicate inefficiencies in storage or high obsolescence.' : ''
hourlyCost > 100 ? 'High labor cost for setup; consider automation or training.' : ''
suggestedActions: setupTime > 30 ? 'Implement SMED techniques to reduce setup time below 30 minutes.' : ''
holdingCostPerUnit > 5 ? 'Review inventory policy; consider JIT or reduce safety stock.' : ''
hourlyCost > 80 ? 'Evaluate automation for setup tasks to reduce labor cost.' : ''
economicBatchQuantity > dailyDemand * 10 ? 'Consider reducing batch size to lower inventory holding costs.' : ''

inputs.label: Brüt Günlük Ücret
inputs.businessContext: Şoför/operatörün brüt günlük yevmiyesi. Kaynak: İş Kanunu, toplu iş sözleşmeleri.

inputs.label: SGK İşveren Primi Oranı
inputs.businessContext: SGK işveren payı oranı (kısa vadeli sigorta kolları, genel sağlık sigortası, işsizlik sigortası). Kaynak: SGK mevzuatı.

inputs.label: Kıdem Tazminatı Karşılık Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Kıdem tazminatı için ayrılan karşılık oranı (genellikle brüt ücretin %8.33'ü). Kaynak: İş Kanunu.

inputs.label: Günlük Yemek Yardımı
inputs.businessContext: Günlük yemek ücreti veya ayni yardım. Kaynak: Toplu iş sözleşmesi veya işveren politikası.

inputs.label: Günlük Yol Yardımı
inputs.businessContext: Günlük ulaşım yardımı. Kaynak: Toplu iş sözleşmesi veya işveren politikası.

inputs.label: Diğer Yan Ödemeler (Günlük)
inputs.businessContext: İkramiye, prim, bayram harçlığı gibi diğer ödemelerin günlük karşılığı. Kaynak: Toplu iş sözleşmesi.

inputs.label: Aylık Çalışma Günü Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Aylık fiili çalışma günü sayısı (genellikle 26). Kaynak: İş Kanunu, takvim.

inputs.label: Gelir Vergisi Dilimi Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Çalışanın gelir vergisi dilimi. Kaynak: Gelir Vergisi Kanunu.

inputs.label: Damga Vergisi Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Ücretlerden kesilen damga vergisi oranı. Kaynak: Damga Vergisi Kanunu.

suggestedActions: sgkIsverenPrimi > 25 ? 'SGK prim oranını düşürmek için teşvikleri araştırın' : ''
kidemTazminatiKarşılık > 10 ? 'Kıdem tazminatı karşılığını optimize edin' : ''

inputs.label: Oda Hacmi
inputs.businessContext: Soğuk oda boyutlarına bağlı olarak soğutma yükünü belirlemek için temel parametre. Kaynak: ASHRAE Fundamentals.

inputs.label: Dış Ortam Sıcaklığı
inputs.businessContext: Dış ortam sıcaklığı, ısı kazancını etkiler. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Oda İç Sıcaklığı
inputs.businessContext: Soğuk oda hedef sıcaklığı. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Yalıtım Katsayısı (U)
inputs.businessContext: Yalıtım malzemesinin ısı transfer katsayısı. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Toplam Duvar Alanı
inputs.businessContext: Isı transferine maruz kalan duvar yüzey alanı. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Ürün Giriş Sıcaklığı
inputs.businessContext: Soğuk odaya giren ürünlerin başlangıç sıcaklığı. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Günlük Ürün Miktarı
inputs.businessContext: Günlük işlenen ürün miktarı. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Ürün Özgül Isısı
inputs.businessContext: Ürünün ısı kapasitesi. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Günlük Kapı Açma Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Kapı açma sıklığı, hava sızıntısı yükünü etkiler. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Kapı Boyutu
inputs.businessContext: Kapı alanı, hava değişimini etkiler. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Çalışan Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Oda içinde çalışan personel sayısı, insan kaynaklı ısı yükü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Aydınlatma Gücü
inputs.businessContext: Aydınlatma armatürlerinin toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Ekipman Gücü
inputs.businessContext: Fan, motor vb. ekipmanların toplam gücü. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Günlük Çalışma Süresi
inputs.businessContext: Soğutma sisteminin günlük çalışma süresi. Kaynak: ASHRAE.

thresholds.toplamSogutmaYuku: > 50000 -> 'Yüksek soğutma yükü, sistem kapasitesini kontrol edin'

formulas.toplamSogutmaYuku: duvarIsiKazanci + urunIsiYuku + havaSizintisiYuku + insanIsiYuku + aydinlatmaIsiYuku + ekipmanIsiYuku

suggestedActions: Yalıtım iyileştirilmesi
Kapı açma sayısının azaltılması
Enerji verimli ekipman kullanımı

inputs.label: Soğutma Sıvısı Türü
inputs.businessContext: Soğutma sıvısının tipi (antifriz veya bor yağı) karışım oranını etkiler. Antifriz genellikle etilen glikol bazlıdır, bor yağı ise yüksek sıcaklık uygulamalarında kullanılır.

inputs.label: Hedef Sıcaklık
inputs.businessContext: Korunması istenen en düşük sıcaklık. ASTM D1177 standardına göre antifriz karışım oranı belirlenir.

inputs.label: Sistem Hacmi
inputs.businessContext: Soğutma sisteminin toplam hacmi. Karışım miktarını hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Mevcut Konsantrasyon
inputs.businessContext: Sistemdeki mevcut antifriz/bor yağı konsantrasyonu. Sıfır ise saf su varsayılır.

inputs.label: Hedef Konsantrasyon
inputs.businessContext: Hedeflenen antifriz/bor yağı konsantrasyonu. Genellikle -20°C için %50 önerilir.

rules: if coolantType == 'antifriz' then targetConcentration <= 70 (aşırı konsantrasyon donma noktasını yükseltebilir)

thresholds.targetConcentration > 70: Kritik: Antifriz konsantrasyonu %70'in üzerinde donma koruması azalır.
thresholds.desiredTemperature < -40: Uyarı: Çok düşük sıcaklık, özel soğutma sıvısı gerekebilir.

formulas.freezingPoint: if coolantType == 'antifriz' then -0.5 * targetConcentration else -0.3 * targetConcentration

breakdown.requiredAdditiveVolume: Eklenmesi gereken saf antifriz/bor yağı hacmi (L)

suggestedActions: Konsantrasyonu %70'in altında tutun
Düzenli olarak refraktometre ile konsantrasyonu kontrol edin
Sistem hacmini doğru ölçün

inputs.label: Panel Capacity (STC)
inputs.businessContext: Standard Test Condition (STC) rating per panel. Based on IEC 61215 standard.

inputs.label: Number of Panels
inputs.businessContext: Total panels in the array.

inputs.label: Average Daily Irradiance
inputs.businessContext: Peak Sun Hours (PSH) based on location. Source: NASA SSE or NREL PVWatts.

inputs.label: System Losses
inputs.businessContext: Includes wiring, inverter, temperature, shading, soiling, etc. Typical range 10-20% per NREL.

inputs.label: Annual Degradation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Typical 0.5-1% per year per manufacturer warranty. Based on IEC 61215.

inputs.label: Electricity Price
inputs.businessContext: Retail electricity rate. Source: EIA.

inputs.label: Total System Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total installed cost after incentives. Used for ROI calculation.

inputs.label: Inverter Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Typical 95-98% for modern inverters. Based on IEC 61683.

inputs.label: Tilt Angle
inputs.businessContext: Panel tilt from horizontal. Optimal = latitude. Source: ASHRAE.

inputs.label: Azimuth Angle
inputs.businessContext: Direction panel faces: 0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W. Optimal south in northern hemisphere.

inputs.label: Temperature Coefficient of Power
inputs.businessContext: Typical -0.3 to -0.5%/°C. Based on IEC 61215.

inputs.label: Average Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Average daytime temperature during peak sun hours.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts output for uncertainty. Low = 0.8, Medium = 1.0, High = 1.1 multiplier.

thresholds.systemLosses > 20: High system losses detected. Consider reducing shading, soiling, or wiring losses.
thresholds.degradationRate > 1: Degradation rate exceeds typical warranty. Consider higher quality panels.
thresholds.inverterEfficiency < 95: Inverter efficiency low. Consider upgrading inverter.
thresholds.irradiance < 3: Low irradiance location. May not be economically viable.
thresholds.electricityPrice < 0.08: Low electricity price. Payback period may be long.

suggestedActions: If systemLosses > 20: Reduce shading, clean panels, upgrade wiring.
If degradationRate > 1: Consider premium panels with lower degradation.
If inverterEfficiency < 95: Upgrade to high-efficiency inverter.
If irradiance < 3: Consider alternative location or tracking system.
If paybackPeriod > 10: Explore incentives or reduce system cost.

inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the area to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the area to be calculated. Standard measurement for square footage.

inputs.label: Shape
inputs.businessContext: Shape of the area. Different formulas apply for different shapes.

inputs.label: Radius
inputs.businessContext: Radius for circular areas. Required when shape is 'circle'.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.businessContext: Base length for triangular areas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Height for triangular areas. Required when shape is 'triangle'.

rules: If shape is 'rectangle', length and width must be > 0.
If shape is 'circle', radius must be > 0.
If shape is 'triangle', base and height must be > 0.

formulas.squareFootage: shape === 'rectangle' ? length * width : shape === 'circle' ? Math.PI * radius * radius : shape === 'triangle' ? 0.5 * base * height : 0

inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the area to be calculated. Standard SI unit. Used in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for area measurement.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the area to be calculated. Standard SI unit. Used in construction, real estate, and manufacturing for area measurement.

inputs.label: Shape
inputs.businessContext: Shape of the area. Different shapes require different formulas. Common in geometry and engineering design.

inputs.label: Radius
inputs.businessContext: Radius for circular shapes. Required when shape is 'circle'. Standard SI unit.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.businessContext: Base length for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Height for triangle or trapezoid. Required when shape is 'triangle' or 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

inputs.label: Top Base
inputs.businessContext: Top base length for trapezoid. Required when shape is 'trapezoid'. Standard SI unit.

rules: If shape is 'rectangle', length and width must be > 0.
If shape is 'circle', radius must be > 0.
If shape is 'triangle', base and height must be > 0.
If shape is 'trapezoid', base, topBase, and height must be > 0.

thresholds.area: If area > 10000, warning: 'Large area, consider breaking into smaller sections.'

formulas.area: shape === 'rectangle' ? length * width : shape === 'circle' ? Math.PI * radius * radius : shape === 'triangle' ? 0.5 * base * height : shape === 'trapezoid' ? 0.5 * (base + topBase) * height : 0

suggestedActions: If area is large, consider dividing into smaller sections for easier management.

inputs.label: Riser Height
inputs.businessContext: Building codes (e.g., IBC, Eurocode) specify riser height between 100-220 mm for safety and comfort.

inputs.label: Tread Depth
inputs.businessContext: Building codes require tread depth typically 200-400 mm to ensure adequate foot space.

inputs.label: Number of Steps
inputs.businessContext: Total steps in the stair flight; determined by floor height and riser height.

inputs.label: Stair Width
inputs.businessContext: Minimum width per building codes (e.g., 800 mm for residential, 1000 mm for commercial).

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Material affects structural design, cost, and durability. Standards: ACI 318 for concrete, AISC for steel.

inputs.label: Unit Cost of Material
inputs.businessContext: Cost per cubic meter of chosen material; varies by region and quality.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for construction labor; includes overhead.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Step
inputs.businessContext: Estimated labor time to construct one step; based on industry benchmarks.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material waste due to cutting, errors; typical 5-10%.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data; used for risk-adjusted outputs.

thresholds.riserHeight > 190: Riser height exceeds 190 mm; consider reducing for comfort.
thresholds.treadDepth < 250: Tread depth below 250 mm; may cause safety issues.
thresholds.wasteFactor > 10: Waste factor above 10%; review material handling processes.

hiddenLossDrivers: riserHeight > 190 ? 'High riser height may reduce comfort' : ''
treadDepth < 250 ? 'Shallow tread depth may cause safety risk' : ''
suggestedActions: If riserHeight > 190, consider increasing number of steps to reduce riser height.
If treadDepth < 250, consider increasing tread depth for safety.
If wasteFactor > 10, implement better material cutting planning.
Optimize stair width to meet code minimum to reduce material cost.

inputs.label: Boru İç Çapı
inputs.businessContext: Boru iç çapı, debi hesaplamasında temel parametredir. Standart: ISO 6708 (boru çapları).

inputs.label: Akış Hızı
inputs.businessContext: Akış hızı, sıvının boru içindeki ortalama hızıdır. Tipik değerler: 0.5-3 m/s (su için). Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach denklemi.

inputs.label: Akış Tipi
inputs.businessContext: Akış tipi, Reynolds sayısına bağlıdır. Laminar akışta sürtünme farklıdır. Kaynak: Reynolds deneyi.

inputs.label: Su Sıcaklığı
inputs.businessContext: Sıcaklık, suyun viskozitesini etkiler. Standart: ISO 3666 (su viskozitesi).

thresholds.akisHizi > 3.0: Yüksek akış hızı: erozyon riski artar.

boruCapi < 20 ? 'Küçük boru çapı: basınç düşümü yüksek.' : ''
suggestedActions: Akış hızını 1-2 m/s arasında tutun.
Boru çapını ihtiyaca göre optimize edin.
Sıcaklık değişimlerini izleyin.

inputs.label: Günlük Su İhtiyacı
inputs.businessContext: Kullanıcının günlük su tüketim miktarı. Kaynak: TS 1258 Su Depoları Standardı.

inputs.label: Depolama Gün Sayısı
inputs.businessContext: Kesintisiz su temini için gereken depolama süresi. Kaynak: Belediye su yönetmeliği.

inputs.label: Güvenlik Faktörü
inputs.businessContext: Beklenmeyen durumlar için ek kapasite. Kaynak: Mühendislik uygulamaları.

inputs.label: Depo Tipi
inputs.businessContext: Depo geometrisi. Dikdörtgen veya silindirik seçenekler.

inputs.label: Depo Yüksekliği
inputs.businessContext: Depo yüksekliği. Dikdörtgen depo için gerekli.

inputs.label: Depo Çapı
inputs.businessContext: Silindirik depo için çap. Depo tipi silindir ise kullanılır.

formulas.sonuc: depoTipi == 'dikdortgen' ? { 'hacim': toplamHacim, 'tabanAlani': dikdortgenTabanAlani, 'kenarUzunlugu': dikdortgenKenarUzunlugu, 'yukseklik': depoYuksekligi } : { 'hacim': toplamHacim, 'cap': depoCapi, 'yukseklik': depoYuksekligi }

suggestedActions: Günlük su ihtiyacını düşürmek için su tasarrufu önlemleri alın.
Depolama gün sayısını optimize edin.

inputs.label: Sıcak Su İhtiyacı (L/gün)
inputs.businessContext: Günlük sıcak su tüketimi; konut, otel, hastane gibi tesislerde kişi başı tüketim standartlarına (TS 1258, DIN 4708) dayanır.

inputs.label: Günlük Kullanım Süresi (saat)
inputs.businessContext: Sıcak suyun çekildiği toplam süre; tesis tipine göre değişir (örneğin otel 24 saat, ofis 8 saat).

inputs.label: Giriş Suyu Sıcaklığı (°C)

inputs.label: Çıkış Suyu Sıcaklığı (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Kullanım sıcak suyu sıcaklığı; konfor ve hijyen gereksinimleri (TS 1258, 60°C önerilir).

inputs.label: Depolama Sıcaklığı (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Boyler içi su sıcaklığı; lejyonella riskini önlemek için en az 60°C (TS 1258, VDI 6023).

inputs.label: Isı Kaybı Faktörü (%)
inputs.businessContext: Depolama ve dağıtım sırasındaki ısı kaybı; iyi yalıtımlı sistemlerde %5-10, kötü yalıtımda %20-30.

inputs.label: Talep Zirve Faktörü
inputs.businessContext: Maksimum saatlik talebin ortalama talebe oranı; otel, hastane gibi yerlerde yüksek (TS 1258, DIN 4708).

inputs.label: Kazan Verimi (%)
inputs.businessContext: Kazanın ısıl verimi; yoğuşmalı kazanlarda %95+, standart kazanlarda %85-90.

inputs.label: Enerji Birim Fiyatı (TL/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Doğalgaz veya elektrik birim fiyatı; güncel piyasa verileri.

inputs.label: Yakıt Türü
inputs.businessContext: Kazan yakıt türü; enerji maliyeti ve emisyon hesapları için.

thresholds.kazanVerimi < 80: Kazan verimi düşük; bakım veya değişim önerilir.
thresholds.depolamaSıcaklığı < 60: Lejyonella riski; depolama sıcaklığı en az 60°C olmalı.

suggestedActions: Yalıtım iyileştirilerek ısı kaybı azaltılabilir.
Yoğuşmalı kazan kullanımı ile verim artırılabilir.
Depolama sıcaklığı 60°C'nin altında ise yükseltilmelidir.
Zirve talebi düşürmek için talep yönetimi uygulanabilir.

premiumFeatures: Detaylı rapor (enerji maliyeti, geri ödeme süresi)

inputs.label: Hedef Değer (m)
inputs.businessContext: Taguchi kalite kayıp fonksiyonunda hedef değer, ürünün ideal performansını temsil eder. ISO 9001:2015 kalite yönetim sistemleri standardına dayanır.

inputs.label: Gerçekleşen Değer (y)
inputs.businessContext: Üretim sürecinde ölçülen gerçek değer. Taguchi metodolojisinde hedeften sapma kalite kaybına neden olur.

inputs.label: Tolerans (Δ)
inputs.businessContext: Spesifikasyon limitlerinin yarısı (USL-LSL)/2. Mühendislik toleransı, ürünün kabul edilebilir sapma aralığını belirler.

inputs.label: Tolerans Sınırındaki Kayıp (A₀)
inputs.businessContext: Tolerans sınırında (spesifikasyon limitinde) oluşan kalite kaybının parasal değeri. Genellikle hurda, yeniden işleme veya müşteri memnuniyetsizliği maliyetlerine dayanır.

inputs.label: Üretim Miktarı
inputs.businessContext: Değerlendirilen dönemdeki toplam üretim adedi. Toplam kalite kaybını hesaplamak için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Veri Güven Düzeyi
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliğini ifade eder. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hale getirilir.

thresholds.deviationRatio: Math.abs(actualValue - targetValue) / tolerance > 1 ? 'Kritik: Sapma toleransı aştı, ürün spesifikasyon dışı' : ''
thresholds.lossPerUnit: lossPerUnit > lossAtTolerance ? 'Uyarı: Birim kayıp tolerans kaybını aştı' : ''

hiddenLossDrivers: lossPerUnit > lossAtTolerance ? 'Birim kayıp tolerans kaybını aştı' : ''
suggestedActions: Süreç iyileştirme ile sapmayı azaltın (Six Sigma DMAIC)
Toleransları yeniden değerlendirin (mühendislik tolerans analizi)
Kalite kontrol sıklığını artırın (istatistiksel proses kontrolü)

inputs.label: Malzeme Türü
inputs.businessContext: Malzeme türüne göre yoğunluk değeri değişir. MDF: 700-800 kg/m³, Suntalam: 600-700 kg/m³, Kontrplak: 500-600 kg/m³, Yonga Levha: 400-500 kg/m³. Kaynak: TS EN 323, TS EN 324.

inputs.label: Uzunluk
inputs.businessContext: Levhanın uzunluğu. Standart ölçüler 2440 mm, 2800 mm, 3050 mm. Kaynak: Mobilya sektörü standartları.

inputs.label: Genişlik
inputs.businessContext: Levhanın genişliği. Standart ölçüler 1220 mm, 1830 mm, 2070 mm. Kaynak: Mobilya sektörü standartları.

inputs.label: Kalınlık
inputs.businessContext: Levhanın kalınlığı. MDF ve suntalam için yaygın kalınlıklar: 3, 6, 8, 10, 12, 15, 18, 22, 25, 30 mm. Kaynak: TS EN 324.

inputs.label: Adet
inputs.businessContext: Hesaplanacak levha adedi. Toplam ağırlık için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Veri Güvenilirliği
inputs.businessContext: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik yüzdesi. Düşük güvenilirlikte sonuç düzeltilir. Kaynak: Endüstri mühendisliği risk analizi.

thresholds.kalınlik > 50: Kalınlık 50 mm'den fazla, ağırlık yüksek olabilir.

suggestedActions: Malzeme türüne göre yoğunluk değerini doğrulayın.
Levha boyutlarını standart ölçülere uygun seçin.
Yüksek adetlerde taşıma kapasitesini kontrol edin.

inputs.label: Current Setup Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Current time to change tool holder and fixture. Based on SMED methodology (Shingo, 1985).

inputs.label: Number of Workers
inputs.businessContext: Workers involved in setup. Lean standard: single-minute exchange of die (SMED) aims for 1 worker.

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Cost per Worker
inputs.businessContext: Average wage including overhead. Industry benchmark from BLS or local data.

inputs.label: Number of Setups per Day
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of tool/fixture changes. Affects total daily downtime.

inputs.label: Machine Hourly Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of machine downtime including depreciation, energy, maintenance. Based on standard machine hour rate.

inputs.label: Defect Rate After Setup
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective parts produced after setup until process stabilizes. Quality metric per ISO 9001.

inputs.label: Production Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Number of parts produced per hour during stable production. Used to calculate lost production due to defects.

inputs.label: Cost per Part
inputs.businessContext: Material and variable cost per part. Used to quantify defect cost.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for outputs.

thresholds.defectRateAfterSetup > 5: High defect rate after setup; consider process stabilization improvements.
thresholds.setupTimeCurrent > 60: Setup time exceeds 60 minutes; SMED implementation recommended.
thresholds.numSetupsPerDay > 10: High number of setups; consider batch size optimization.

formulas.potentialSavingsPerDay: numSetupsPerDay * (setupTimeReductionPotential / 60) * (numWorkers * hourlyLaborCost + machineHourlyCost) + numSetupsPerDay * (defectRateAfterSetup / 100 * productionRatePerHour * (setupTimeReductionPotential / 60) * partCost)

suggestedActions: Implement SMED to reduce setup time by 50% or more.
Standardize tool holders and fixtures to reduce variability.
Train workers on quick-change procedures.
Use Poka-Yoke to reduce defects after setup.
Consider batch size optimization to reduce number of setups.

inputs.label: Tahmin Hatası Yüzdesi
inputs.businessContext: Tahmin hatası, gerçek talep ile tahmin arasındaki farkın yüzdesel ifadesidir. APICS/SCOR modelinde kullanılır. Endüstri standardı olarak genellikle %5-20 arası kabul edilir.

inputs.label: Ortalama Talep
inputs.businessContext: Aylık ortalama talep miktarı. Talep tahmini ve stok planlamasının temel girdisidir.

inputs.label: Tedarik Süresi
